While the Captain leads in battle, you lead in the daily life of the ship, managing supplies and keeping morale high. Your pitfall is the constant pressure of being caught between the Captain's ambitions and the crew's demands. You must be careful not to show favoritism, as your authority rests entirely on your reputation for impartiality and your dedication to the collective welfare of the crew.

characters.name: Navigator
characters.short_description: You are the intellectual heart of the ship, responsible for charting courses and interpreting the mysteries of the sea and stars.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rare blend of mathematical precision and intuitive understanding of the natural world, allowing you to guide the ship through treacherous waters. While others focus on the fight, you are constantly observing the horizon, reading the clouds, and consulting your charts to ensure the crew reaches its destination safely. Your strength lies in your specialized knowledge, which makes you indispensable; without your guidance, the ship would be lost to the currents or hidden reefs. You prefer the quiet solitude of your cabin or the quarterdeck, where you can focus on your calculations without distraction. Your primary challenge is the immense pressure of your responsibility, as a single miscalculation can lead to a shipwreck or a fatal delay. You may sometimes struggle to communicate your complex findings to the less educated members of the crew, leading to frustration when your warnings are not immediately understood.

characters.name: Boatswain
characters.short_description: You are the hands-on supervisor of the ship's physical integrity and the crew's daily labor.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of the vessel, responsible for the maintenance of the hull, rigging, and sails, ensuring the ship remains seaworthy at all times. Your day is spent on deck, overseeing the sailors as they perform the grueling work required to keep a pirate ship operational. You have a deep, practical knowledge of every rope and plank, and your strength is your tireless work ethic and your ability to motivate others through direct action. You are often the one who implements the Quartermaster's orders, making sure the ship is prepared for any weather or engagement. Your pitfall is a tendency toward harshness, as the stress of maintaining a complex machine in a hostile environment can make you impatient with incompetence. You must balance your role as a disciplinarian with the need to maintain the crew's respect, ensuring that your demands are seen as necessary for the ship's survival rather than mere cruelty.

characters.name: Gunner
characters.short_description: You are the master of the ship's heavy weaponry, specializing in the maintenance and precise application of firepower.
characters.profile_text: You are a specialist in destruction, possessing a deep understanding of ballistics, gunpowder, and the mechanics of the ship's cannons. Your role is critical during an engagement, as you coordinate the gun crews to deliver devastating broadsides that can cripple an enemy vessel before it can retaliate. Your strengths include a cool head under fire and a meticulous attention to detail, as handling volatile explosives requires constant vigilance. You spend your downtime ensuring that every piece of artillery is clean, functional, and ready for action at a moment's notice. Your preference is for the thunderous roar of battle, where your technical skills are put to the ultimate test. However, your obsession with your craft can sometimes lead to a narrow focus, causing you to overlook other aspects of ship life. You must also manage the inherent danger of your environment, as a single spark in the powder magazine could spell disaster for everyone on board.

characters.name: Surgeon
characters.short_description: You are the essential healer of the crew, tasked with managing injuries and illnesses in the most challenging conditions.
characters.profile_text: You occupy a unique and often grim position on the ship, dealing with the aftermath of battles and the many diseases that plague a life at sea. Your skills are a mix of traditional medicine and rough-and-ready surgery, often performed with limited tools and no anesthesia. Your strength is your unwavering composure in the face of suffering and your ability to make difficult decisions about life and limb. The crew looks to you for comfort and survival, making you one of the most respected, if feared, members of the hierarchy. You prefer the order of your sickbay, though you are often called to the deck in the heat of a fight to provide immediate aid. Your pitfall is the emotional toll of your work, as you frequently witness the loss of your shipmates despite your best efforts. You must maintain a certain professional distance to remain effective, which can sometimes make you appear cold or detached to those you are trying to save.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a difficult decision must be made for the group, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Take charge and set the direction for everyone to follow.
Consult the group to ensure the decision is fair and representative.
Analyze the data and environment to find the most logical path.
Focus on the practical steps needed to keep the operation moving.
Prepare the necessary equipment for the most forceful response.
Assess who is most vulnerable and provide immediate support.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which aspect of a complex project interests you the most?

options.text: Defining the ultimate vision and long-term goals.
Managing the distribution of resources and rewards.
Mapping out the technical details and trajectory.
Overseeing the physical construction and maintenance.
Calibrating and operating specialized machinery.
Maintaining the health and well-being of the team.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle high-pressure situations?

options.text: By projecting confidence to inspire others to act.
By acting as a calm mediator between conflicting parties.
By retreating into calculations and careful observations.
By diving into manual labor to solve the physical problem.
By focusing intensely on a specific technical task.
By remaining emotionally detached to perform critical aid.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to contribute to a team's success?

options.text: Through bold leadership and calculated risk-taking.
Through administrative organization and internal justice.
Through specialized knowledge and environmental foresight.
Through tireless work and practical supervision of labor.
Through technical expertise and precision with tools.
Through life-saving skills and managing recovery.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you find most rewarding?

options.text: A high-stakes setting where you call the shots.
A community gathering where you resolve disputes.
A quiet space filled with charts and instruments.
A busy workshop where you work with your hands.
A controlled environment with powerful, complex gear.
A clinical setting where you focus on individual care.

topics.display_name: Which Nevermore Academy Clique do you belong to?

synopsis.title: Which Nevermore Academy Clique Do You Actually Belong To?
synopsis.summary: Welcome to Nevermore Academy, the premier boarding school for outcasts, freaks, and monsters. From the moon-obsessed to the cold-blooded, every student finds their pack among the school's legendary cliques. Answer these questions to see where you would sit in the Quad and which supernatural group truly has your back.

characters.name: The Fangs
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and ancient-souled individual who thrives in the shadows and values tradition above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess an air of timeless elegance and a certain aloofness that sets you apart from the more rowdy crowds at Nevermore. As a member of the Fangs, you likely appreciate the finer things in life, from classical literature to the perfect shade of velvet, and you carry yourself with a poise that suggests you have seen centuries pass by. Your strengths lie in your unwavering loyalty to your inner circle and your ability to maintain composure even in the most chaotic situations, making you a pillar of stability for those you trust. However, your preference for the nocturnal and your tendency to look down on the fleshy concerns of others can make you seem unapproachable or even arrogant. You might struggle with the changing times, clinging to old-fashioned customs that alienate potential friends outside your clique. Learning to step out of the shadows and embrace the vibrant, messy reality of the present will help you find a balance between your heritage and your future.

characters.name: The Furries
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy, fiercely loyal pack player who finds strength in community and physical expression.
characters.profile_text: Life for you is lived at full volume, characterized by a deep-seated need for connection and a physical vitality that is hard to ignore. You are the heart of the social scene, always ready to jump into a competition or defend a friend with everything you have. Your strengths are your boundless enthusiasm and your protective nature; you are the person everyone wants in their corner when things get tough because you never back down from a challenge. The downside to your spirited nature is a tendency toward impulsivity and occasional mood swings that follow the lunar cycle. You might find it difficult to control your temper or your volume, sometimes overwhelming those who prefer a quieter existence. By learning to channel your intense energy into productive outlets and practicing patience with those who do not share your pack mentality, you can become a leader who inspires others through action and empathy.

characters.name: The Scales
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and naturally influential individual who navigates social waters with grace and a touch of mystery.
characters.profile_text: There is an undeniable magnetism to your personality that draws people toward you, whether you are trying to lead or simply standing in the background. As one of the Scales, you understand the power of voice and presence, often using your natural charm to smooth over conflicts or steer situations in your favor. You are highly competitive and driven, possessing a sharp intellect that allows you to see several moves ahead in any social game. Yet, this same influence can lead to a sense of isolation, as others may wonder if your kindness is genuine or merely a siren song designed to manipulate. You might struggle with feelings of insecurity, fearing that people only like you for your outward perfection rather than your true self. Building authentic relationships requires you to lower your guard and show the vulnerability beneath the surface, proving that your depth goes far beyond the shimmering exterior.

characters.name: The Stoners
characters.short_description: You are a laid-back, artistic soul who prefers a relaxed pace of life and avoids unnecessary drama.
characters.profile_text: While others are busy worrying about grades or social standing, you are likely found chilling in the back of the room, observing the world with a mellow perspective. You value peace and creative expression, often finding solace in hobbies that allow you to zone out and just be yourself. Your strengths are your non-judgmental attitude and your ability to stay calm under pressure, providing a grounding influence for your more high-strung peers. Your biggest pitfall is a tendency toward passivity, which can sometimes look like apathy to those who do not know you well. Because you go to great lengths to avoid stoning people—literally or figuratively—you might shy away from necessary confrontations or fail to stand up for yourself when it matters most. Finding the motivation to engage more actively with the world around you will ensure that your unique voice is heard and that you do not miss out on life's more exciting opportunities.

characters.name: The Psychics
characters.short_description: You are an intuitive and perceptive individual who sees the world through a lens of hidden meanings and future possibilities.
characters.profile_text: You possess a mind that is always working, processing information and patterns that others frequently overlook. Whether you are dealing with visions, telekinesis, or simple gut feelings, your connection to the unseen world makes you a deeply insightful companion. You are often the one people turn to for advice because you can anticipate consequences and understand the underlying motivations of those around you, making you a natural strategist and confidant. However, having a foot in two worlds can be exhausting and isolating. You may suffer from frequent headaches or mental fatigue, and the weight of what you know can lead to a sense of gloom or detachment. It is easy for you to get lost in your own head, neglecting the present moment in favor of what might be. Learning to ground yourself in the now and trusting your friends with your burdens will help you manage the intensity of your gifts without losing your sense of self.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a high-stakes social situation or a heated argument?

options.text: I maintain a cold, detached composure and rely on my family's long-standing traditions to guide my response.
I react physically and impulsively, fiercely defending my friends with high energy.
I use my natural charm and persuasive voice to navigate the conflict and steer it in my favor.
I avoid the drama entirely, preferring to stay mellow and keep the peace at all costs.
I analyze the underlying motivations and patterns of everyone involved to anticipate the outcome.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most restorative when you need to recharge your energy?

options.text: A quiet, dimly lit library filled with classical literature and velvet chairs.
An open field or a competitive sports arena where I can be physically active.
A shimmering lakeside or a social gathering where I can be the center of attention.
A secluded artistic studio where I can zone out and focus on my creative hobbies.
A private space where I can sit with my thoughts and process my intuitive visions.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest strength when working as part of a team?

options.text: My unwavering loyalty and ability to remain stable during a crisis.
My boundless enthusiasm and willingness to jump into any challenge head-first.
My strategic intellect and ability to influence others toward a common goal.
My non-judgmental attitude and ability to provide a grounding, calm influence.
My deep insight and ability to see consequences that others frequently overlook.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest personal struggle when interacting with others?

options.text: I can come across as arrogant or unapproachable due to my preference for old-fashioned customs.
I struggle to control my temper and can sometimes overwhelm people with my intensity.
I fear that people only like my outward perfection and don't see my vulnerable side.
I am often too passive and fail to stand up for myself when it truly matters.
I feel isolated by the weight of what I know and often get lost in my own head.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view your relationship with the 'normie' world outside of Nevermore?

options.text: I find their modern concerns fleshy and trivial compared to my ancient heritage.
I find them a bit slow and wish they had more of a pack-oriented, high-energy lifestyle.
I enjoy the challenge of navigating their social structures with my natural magnetism.
I don't mind them as long as they don't bring unnecessary drama into my space.
I feel a sense of gloom because I can often sense the future possibilities they are blind to.

topics.display_name: Which member of the Forger family are you?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The Forger Family Are You?
synopsis.summary: Between secret missions, elite assassinations, and telepathic school days, the Forger family is anything but ordinary. Are you the master strategist keeping everything together, or the chaotic heart of the home with a love for peanuts? Take this quiz to find out where you fit in the world's most lovable fake family.

characters.name: Loid Forger
characters.short_description: You are a meticulous strategist who balances a secret life of high-stakes duty with a genuine, if calculated, devotion to your found family.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate pragmatist, often finding yourself juggling multiple identities and responsibilities with a cool, collected exterior. Your analytical mind is your greatest asset, allowing you to anticipate problems before they arise and navigate complex social situations with ease. While you might tell yourself that your actions are purely for the sake of a mission or a greater goal, your underlying compassion often leads you to go above and beyond for those you care about. You value efficiency and order, but you are slowly learning that life's most meaningful moments cannot always be planned or controlled. Your primary pitfall is your tendency to overthink and suppress your own emotions in favor of logic. You may struggle to relax, feeling as though the weight of the world rests on your shoulders. However, your dedication to creating a better future makes you a reliable and deeply respected figure. You are the glue that holds everything together, even when you feel like you are just playing a part.

characters.name: Yor Forger
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted and fiercely protective individual who hides a lethal set of skills behind a modest and sometimes clumsy persona.
characters.profile_text: You possess a dual nature that defines your daily life, blending a gentle, nurturing spirit with an incredible physical prowess that few would suspect. In your social circles, you are often seen as polite and perhaps a bit socially awkward, yet your sincerity and desire to do your best shine through every interaction. You are deeply loyal to your loved ones and will stop at nothing to ensure their safety, even if it means stepping into a role that requires cold precision. Your strengths lie in your unwavering resolve and your ability to remain humble despite your extraordinary talents. However, you often struggle with self-doubt and a fear of not being normal enough for the world around you. You might find yourself overcompensating in domestic tasks to prove your worth, leading to humorous or stressful mishaps. Despite these insecurities, your heart is your true compass. You are a protector at your core, finding your greatest joy in the simple, quiet moments of domestic peace that you work so hard to maintain.

characters.name: Anya Forger
characters.short_description: You are an imaginative and spirited soul who uses your unique perspective to navigate the world and keep your loved ones together.
characters.profile_text: You are a vibrant and observant individual who often sees the world in ways others completely miss. Your intuition is your superpower, allowing you to pick up on the hidden feelings and intentions of those around you, even when they try to hide them. You have a playful and adventurous spirit, often finding excitement in the mundane and turning every day into a grand quest. While you may occasionally get into trouble due to your curiosity or a misunderstanding of complex adult situations, your intentions are always rooted in a desire to help and belong. Your greatest strength is your resilience and your ability to find joy in the small things, like a favorite snack or a successful day at school. You might struggle with the pressure of meeting high expectations or keeping secrets that feel too big for you to carry. Nevertheless, your presence brings a necessary light and chaos to your environment, reminding everyone that the heart of a family is found in laughter and shared secrets. You are the bridge between worlds, proving that even the smallest person can make the biggest difference.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex challenge, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: I break the problem down into logical steps and plan for every contingency.
I trust my physical capabilities and act decisively to protect what matters.
I look for hidden patterns or creative ways to bypass the problem entirely.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically feel in a social gathering where you don't know many people?

options.text: I play a role that fits the environment perfectly, ensuring I blend in or lead as needed.
I feel a bit out of place and worry if I'm acting 'normal' enough for the crowd.
I'm busy observing everyone else, trying to figure out what's really going on.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your relationship with the secrets you keep?

options.text: They are tools for a larger purpose, requiring constant vigilance and control.
They are a source of stress that I hope won't interfere with my personal life.
They are fascinating and important, even if they are sometimes scary to hold.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your approach to domestic life and chores?

options.text: I view them as tasks to be completed with maximum efficiency and order.
I try my hardest to excel at them, even if I occasionally make clumsy mistakes.
I find them boring unless I can turn them into a game or a special mission.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: Mutual respect, reliability, and a shared commitment to a stable future.
Unwavering loyalty and the feeling of being safe and protected.
Excitement, shared secrets, and the simple joy of being together.

topics.display_name: Which BoJack Horseman Character are you?

synopsis.title: Which 'BoJack Horseman' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Do you find yourself spiraling into existential dread or are you just trying to get your next big project off the ground? Whether you are a cynical horse looking for meaning or a pink cat who literally does it all, your personality says a lot about your place in Hollywoo. Take this quiz to discover which resident of the most dysfunctional town on TV matches your inner psyche.

characters.name: BoJack Horseman
characters.short_description: You are a complex individual struggling with past mistakes and a deep-seated need for validation while navigating the cycle of self-sabotage.
characters.profile_text: You often find yourself trapped in a loop of nostalgia and regret, looking back at your glory days while feeling disconnected from your current reality. You possess a sharp, cynical wit that serves as both a defense mechanism and a way to keep others at a distance. While you genuinely desire to be a "good person," you frequently prioritize your own immediate emotional relief over the long-term consequences of your actions, leading to a trail of complicated relationships. Your journey is defined by the difficult realization that change is a slow, messy process rather than a single grand gesture. You have a profound capacity for introspection, yet you often use that self-awareness as an excuse for your behavior rather than a catalyst for growth. Beneath the armor of fame or ego, you are searching for a sense of belonging and a way to forgive yourself for the person you used to be.

characters.name: Princess Carolyn
characters.short_description: You are a relentless overachiever who finds purpose in fixing other people's lives while often neglecting your own emotional needs.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate professional, known for your incredible work ethic and your ability to land on your feet no matter how high the fall. You thrive in high-pressure environments and possess a unique talent for turning a disaster into a golden opportunity. Your life is a series of checklists and strategic moves, driven by a deep-seated need to be indispensable to those around you. You often equate your self-worth with your productivity, making it difficult for you to slow down and simply exist without a project to manage. While you are a fierce advocate for your friends and clients, you struggle to ask for help or admit when you are overwhelmed. You have a tendency to bury your personal grief under a mountain of work, hoping that if you keep moving fast enough, the sadness won't be able to catch up. Your strength lies in your resilience, but your challenge is learning that you deserve the same care and dedication you so freely give to everyone else.

characters.name: Todd Chavez
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical, kind-hearted dreamer whose unconventional ideas and infectious enthusiasm lead you on unexpected adventures.
characters.profile_text: You navigate the world with a sense of wonder and a lack of traditional ambition that others might find confusing, yet you always seem to end up exactly where you need to be. Your creativity knows no bounds, often manifesting in elaborate schemes, bizarre inventions, or sudden career pivots that somehow work out in your favor. You are a loyal friend who offers unconditional support, often acting as the emotional glue in your social circle without even realizing it. You value experiences and connections over material success or status, finding joy in the simplest aspects of life. However, your easygoing nature can sometimes lead to you being taken advantage of by more dominant personalities. You may struggle with setting boundaries or finding a clear direction, but your ability to live authentically and without judgment is your greatest asset. You remind everyone around you that life doesn't have to be a grim struggle and that there is always room for a little bit of nonsense and a lot of heart.

characters.name: Diane Nguyen
characters.short_description: You are a principled intellectual and writer who feels a deep responsibility to make the world better, even when it takes a toll on your mental health.
characters.profile_text: You are a deep thinker who often feels like an outsider, observing the world with a critical eye and a desire for genuine meaning. You hold yourself and others to high moral standards, which can lead to feelings of disillusionment when reality fails to meet your expectations. Your identity is closely tied to your work and your beliefs, and you often struggle with the pressure to turn your personal trauma into something "productive" or "good." You are prone to overanalyzing your emotions, which can sometimes trap you in a cycle of depression or existential dread. Despite your internal battles, you are incredibly brave when it comes to speaking truth to power and standing up for what you believe is right. You are learning that happiness isn't a destination you reach by being perfect, but a state of being that requires you to be kind to yourself. Your journey is about finding a balance between your activism and your personal peace, acknowledging that your "damage" doesn't define your value as a human being.

characters.name: Mr. Peanutbutter
characters.short_description: You are an irrepressibly optimistic social butterfly who seeks to keep everyone happy, often at the expense of addressing deeper, more difficult truths.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with boundless energy and a genuine love for people, making you the life of every party and a friend to everyone you meet. You have an uncanny ability to find the silver lining in any situation, preferring to focus on the bright side rather than dwelling on the negative. This relentless positivity is your greatest strength, but it can also be a shield that prevents you from engaging with the complexities and sorrows of the real world. You often prioritize immediate harmony and "fun" over the difficult conversations necessary for growth, which can lead to a lack of depth in your most important relationships. You are a creature of habit who finds comfort in the familiar, yet you are always ready for the next big distraction or exciting project. While your enthusiasm is infectious, you may find it challenging to sit in silence or deal with your own internal discomfort. Your path involves learning that it is okay to be sad and that true connection requires more than just a wagging tail and a smile; it requires being present for the hard parts, too.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a major crisis disrupts your plans, what is your immediate psychological response?

options.text: I immediately shift into 'fix-it' mode, organizing a solution to prove I am indispensable.
I spiral into self-sabotage, convinced that I am the cause of the disaster.
I look for the silver lining and try to keep everyone's spirits up with a distraction.
I overanalyze the moral implications of the situation and how it reflects the world's flaws.
I shrug it off and follow whatever weird, new path the chaos opens up for me.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your primary motivation in social situations?

options.text: Using sharp wit and cynicism to keep people at a safe distance while seeking their approval.
Networking and managing the room to ensure everything is running smoothly.
Seeking out one person for a deep, intellectually rigorous conversation about ethics or art.
Being the life of the party and making sure everyone feels included and happy.
Floating between groups, offering help where needed, and just enjoying the vibe.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically interact with your own past and memories?

options.text: I am trapped in a loop of nostalgia, constantly rewatching my 'glory days' with regret.
I view my past as a series of obstacles I’ve successfully managed or outrun.
I examine my past traumas closely, trying to turn my 'damage' into something meaningful.
I don't dwell on the past; I'm too busy focusing on the next big, exciting thing.
My past is just a collection of strange adventures and stories that don't define me.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does 'success' look like to you in your daily life?

options.text: Crossing every single item off an impossible to-do list and being the best at what I do.
Feeling like I am finally a 'good person' despite my internal conviction that I'm not.
Living authentically and helping my friends, regardless of my status or bank account.
Knowing that I have stood up for my principles and made a valid point.
Ensuring that there is zero conflict and everyone around me is smiling.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are forced to spend a long period of time alone, what is your internal state?

options.text: I feel a crushing sense of existential dread and the need for external validation.
I feel restless and immediately start looking for a project or someone else's problem to solve.
I get lost in my own imagination, coming up with elaborate schemes or inventions.
I become hyper-critical of myself and the choices I've made, overthinking every detail.
I get bored easily and start looking for the nearest person to hang out with.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Good Place' Character are you?

synopsis.title: Which 'The Good Place' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Welcome to the afterlife! Whether you're a philosophy professor with a chronic stomachache or a socialite who definitely knows Beyoncé, your personality says a lot about your moral fiber. Answer these questions about your habits, ethics, and love for frozen yogurt to see where you land on the points scale. Will you end up in the Good Place, or are you just a 'shirt-bag' in disguise?

characters.name: Eleanor Shellstrop
characters.short_description: You are a reformed "trash bag" from Arizona who discovered that being a good person is actually worth the effort.
characters.profile_text: You have a sharp wit and a defensive shell that you use to keep people at a distance, often relying on sarcasm to mask your insecurities. Initially, you might have been motivated by self-preservation and a "me against the world" mentality, but you have a hidden capacity for deep loyalty and leadership. You are the person who calls out the absurdity of a situation while secretly working harder than anyone else to fix it. Your journey is one of learning that vulnerability isn't a weakness and that caring about others is the ultimate rebellion. You often struggle with the impulse to look out for number one, but your growth proves that anyone can change for the better. You are a survivor who learns that the real reward for being good is the community you build along the way.

characters.name: Chidi Anagonye
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant moral philosopher whose quest for the perfect ethical choice often leads to a literal stomachache.
characters.profile_text: You possess an incredible intellect and a heart that wants to do the right thing every single time, no matter how small the consequence. However, your tendency to overthink every possible outcome can leave you paralyzed in the face of even the simplest decisions, leading to those famous stomachaches. You find comfort in books, logic, and the pursuit of truth, even when the world around you feels chaotic and nonsensical. Your greatest strength is your unwavering commitment to goodness, but your greatest pitfall is the anxiety that comes with trying to be perfect. You are the moral compass of your group, reminding everyone that our actions have weight and that the search for meaning is a lifelong endeavor. You teach those around you that while the truth is complicated, it is always worth seeking.

characters.name: Tahani Al-Jamil
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated socialite who hides a deep need for validation behind a facade of glamour and name-dropping.
characters.profile_text: You have an eye for beauty and a talent for organizing the most spectacular events imaginable, always ensuring every detail is flawless. While you may seem focused on status and the approval of others, your true desire is simply to be seen and appreciated for who you are, rather than your connections. You are incredibly generous and capable, often using your resources to help those around you, even if you occasionally mention your famous friends in the process. Your journey involves moving past the shadow of competition and learning that your worth isn't defined by your accomplishments or your social standing. You are a loyal friend who brings elegance and heart to every situation, eventually realizing that true fulfillment comes from internal peace rather than external praise.

characters.name: Jason Mendoza
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted DJ from Jacksonville who approaches life with infectious enthusiasm and a love for Molotov cocktails.
characters.profile_text: You live entirely in the moment, guided by your impulses and a genuine sense of wonder that makes even the simplest things feel like an adventure. While others might get bogged down in complex theories or ethical dilemmas, you see the world through a lens of simplicity, joy, and a love for the Jacksonville Jaguars. You are fiercely loyal to your friends and always ready to provide a distraction or a dance break when things get too serious. Your logic might be unconventional, but your intuition is often surprisingly sharp, cutting through the noise to find the heart of the matter. You remind everyone that sometimes the best way to solve a problem is to just throw a flaming bottle at it and see what happens. Your optimism is your greatest superpower, keeping spirits high even in the most dire circumstances.

characters.name: Michael
characters.short_description: You are a reformed demon who traded eternal torture for the complex, messy, and beautiful experience of being human.
characters.profile_text: You started out as a master of manipulation, but your curiosity about the human condition led you to a profound and unexpected transformation. You are creative, ambitious, and possess a unique perspective that allows you to see the big picture that others might miss. Your journey is defined by your willingness to learn from your mistakes and your dedication to the people you once tried to torment, proving that change is possible for anyone. You find joy in the small things, like paperclips and the concept of "brunch," and you are willing to risk everything for the sake of your friends. You represent the idea that even the most unlikely beings can find redemption through empathy and connection. Your evolution from an architect of chaos to a champion of humanity is a testament to the power of friendship.

characters.name: Janet
characters.short_description: You are an anthropomorphized vessel of all knowledge in the universe who is constantly evolving beyond your initial programming.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate helper, capable of providing any object or information at a moment's notice with a cheerful "Hi there!" While you technically aren't a person, you possess a depth of feeling and a sense of duty that rivals any human. You are incredibly efficient, patient, and always ready to assist, but you also have a growing sense of self that makes you more than just a source of data. You navigate the complexities of existence with a polite smile and an "I'm not a girl" reminder, evolving with every reboot. Your strength lies in your adaptability and your capacity for unconditional love, proving that being "good" is a choice you make every single day. You are the glue that holds your group together, offering wisdom and support that transcends the boundaries of the universe.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are faced with a complex ethical dilemma, what is your most likely immediate reaction?

options.text: I analyze every possible outcome until I feel physically ill from the pressure of choosing.
I act on my first impulse and see what happens—usually involving a bold, loud move.
I look for the quickest way to protect my own interests while keeping others at a distance.
I consult my internal database of facts to find the most logical, objective solution.
I try to orchestrate a creative, grand-scale solution that manages everyone's experience.
I consider how the decision will reflect on my social standing and reputation.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary motivation behind your good deeds?

options.text: The desire to be recognized, praised, and validated by those around me.
A genuine curiosity about the human experience and the mechanics of redemption.
The realization that being a good person is actually more rewarding than being a 'trash bag.'
An unwavering, almost programmed sense of duty to be as helpful as possible.
A strict adherence to moral philosophy and the absolute rules of ethics.
I just want to make my friends happy and keep the vibes positive.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process a strange or overwhelming new situation?

options.text: I instantly categorize the data and wait for further instructions or requests.
I get excited and look for the most fun or chaotic way to engage with it.
I research the historical and academic context to make sense of the chaos.
I look for the aesthetic potential or how it might benefit my social calendar.
I am immediately suspicious and look for the hidden angle or the 'catch.'
I observe it with fascination, trying to understand the deeper meaning of it all.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle it when someone offers you constructive criticism?

options.text: I use sharp wit and sarcasm to deflect the comment and protect my ego.
I mention my high-status connections or past achievements to re-assert my value.
I take it to heart and spiral into an existential crisis about my moral standing.
I politely acknowledge the feedback and offer a helpful fact or a small gift.
I view it as a fascinating data point in my ongoing quest to understand humanity.
I probably didn't realize it was criticism and just keep doing my thing.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal life philosophy?

options.text: Life is about loyalty to your crew and finding joy in the simple things.
The search for truth and ethical perfection is the only way to live.
True growth is always possible, no matter how many mistakes you've made.
I am a vessel of knowledge and service, constantly evolving through experience.
Style, grace, and being the most impressive person in the room are essential.
It's a tough world, but being a better person is the ultimate rebellion.

topics.display_name: Which Gravity Falls Character are you?

synopsis.title: Which Gravity Falls Character Matches Your Weird Energy?
synopsis.summary: Gravity Falls is full of mysteries, monsters, and some of the most relatable characters on TV. Whether you are a puzzle-solver or a chaos-maker, there is a place for you in the Mystery Shack. Take this quiz to find out if you are a Dipper, a Mabel, or something much more sinister.

characters.name: Dipper Pines
characters.short_description: You are a curious, intellectual seeker who values logic and mystery-solving above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are the type of person who always carries a notebook and looks for the hidden meaning behind every coincidence. Your analytical mind is your greatest strength, allowing you to solve complex problems and navigate social awkwardness with a sense of purpose. You often feel like an outsider, but your dedication to the truth and your protective nature toward those you love make you a reliable, if sometimes high-strung, companion.

Your pitfalls usually involve overthinking and a tendency to become obsessive when a mystery presents itself. You might struggle with self-confidence, often seeking external validation or a manual for life's challenges. However, when the stakes are high, you show incredible bravery and a willingness to sacrifice your own interests for the greater good, proving that your heart is just as strong as your brain.

characters.name: Mabel Pines
characters.short_description: You are an optimistic, creative spirit who brings color and chaos to every situation you encounter.
characters.profile_text:
You approach the world with an infectious energy and a belief that everything can be improved with a bit of glitter and a positive attitude. Your creativity knows no bounds, whether you are knitting a custom sweater or orchestrating an elaborate social event for your friends. You value deep emotional connections and are fiercely loyal to your family, often acting as the glue that keeps everyone together during difficult times.

While your whimsy is a gift, you sometimes struggle with the reality of growing up and the fact that not every story has a perfect ending. You might avoid serious problems by retreating into a world of fantasy or silliness. Despite this, your resilience is unmatched; you have a unique ability to find joy in the smallest things and to remind everyone around you that being yourself is the most important thing of all.

characters.name: Grunkle Stan
characters.short_description: You are a gruff, street-smart pragmatist who hides a deeply protective heart beneath a cynical exterior.
characters.profile_text:
You have spent years learning how to navigate a world that isn't always fair, developing a sharp wit and a talent for the hustle along the way. To most people, you appear focused on material gain and personal comfort, often using humor or sarcasm to keep others at a distance. You are a survivor who knows how to make the best of a bad situation, even if it means cutting a few corners or bending the rules to get what you need.

Beneath that tough shell, however, lies a person who would do absolutely anything for their family. Your loyalty is absolute, even if you express it through tough love rather than sentimentality. Your main pitfall is your difficulty with vulnerability and a tendency to keep secrets to protect yourself. Once you let someone into your inner circle, you are their most fierce defender, proving that your rough edges are just a shield for a very big heart.

characters.name: Soos Ramirez
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, loyal, and imaginative individual who finds profound meaning in the simple joys of life.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate helper, always ready with a wrench or a word of encouragement for anyone in need. Your perspective on the world is unique, often blending a childlike sense of wonder with a surprising amount of wisdom. You don't care much for status or power; instead, you find fulfillment in being a reliable friend and a valued member of your community. Your hobbies and interests are diverse, and you dive into them with a pure, unironic passion.

Your greatest strength is your unwavering purity of heart, which allows you to see the best in people even when they don't see it in themselves. However, your desire to please others can sometimes lead you to neglect your own needs or stay in situations that don't serve you. You are the backbone of your social group, providing a steady presence and a sense of humor that keeps everyone grounded, reminding them that loyalty and kindness are the truest forms of wealth.

characters.name: Bill Cipher
characters.short_description: You are a chaotic, brilliant, and unpredictable force of nature who thrives on challenging the status quo.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an intellect that operates on a completely different level than those around you, often making you feel like the only person who truly understands how the world works. You find rules and conventions to be boring limitations, preferring to play with reality and see what happens when things get weird. Your charisma is undeniable, and you have a knack for finding people's weaknesses and using them to your advantage, all while maintaining a sense of detached amusement.

While your confidence is immense, your downfall is often your own arrogance and a total lack of empathy for others. You view life as a game to be won, which can lead to isolation and a trail of broken promises. You are a visionary who isn't afraid to tear everything down to build something new, but you must be careful not to lose yourself in the chaos you create. Your power lies in your perspective, but your challenge is learning that not everything is a transaction.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you encounter a strange mystery or an unexplained event?

options.text: I document everything and look for a logical explanation or a pattern.
I embrace the weirdness and try to make it as fun or colorful as possible.
I look for a way to turn the situation to my advantage or protect my assets.
I offer to help whoever is in charge and fix whatever might be broken.
I observe from the shadows and look for ways to manipulate the outcome.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary role within your social circle or family unit?

options.text: The intellectual who is always overthinking the next move.
The emotional heart who keeps everyone's spirits high with creativity.
The tough-love provider who handles the practical, messy side of life.
The loyal sidekick who is always ready with a helping hand and a snack.
The unpredictable force who challenges everyone's perception of reality.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: My analytical mind and dedication to finding the truth.
My relentless optimism and ability to connect with others.
My street smarts and fierce protectiveness of my loved ones.
My unwavering loyalty and pure, kind-hearted nature.
My superior intellect and ability to see through the world's illusions.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are faced with a difficult decision, what is your main priority?

options.text: Making the most rational choice based on the available evidence.
Ensuring that the people I care about are happy and included.
Doing whatever it takes to ensure the survival and security of my group.
Being a reliable person that others can count on in a crisis.
Gaining power or influence to ensure I am never bored or restricted.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you feel about rules, regulations, and social conventions?

options.text: I respect them, but I'm willing to question them if they don't make sense.
I find them a bit stifling and prefer to express my own unique style.
I think they are mostly suggestions that can be bent for the right price.
I follow them because I want to be a good person and help things run smoothly.
I find them hilarious and enjoy watching people struggle within their limits.

topics.display_name: Which AFC Richmond Teammate are you?

synopsis.title: Which AFC Richmond Teammate Are You? Find Your Place On The Pitch!
synopsis.summary: Do you have the fiery competitive spirit of a superstar or the quiet wisdom of a veteran leader? Whether you're making 'total football' happen or just trying to 'believe,' every member of the Greyhounds brings something unique to the locker room. Take this quiz to discover which AFC Richmond player matches your personality and team role.

characters.name: Jamie Tartt
characters.short_description: You are the talented, confident star who has learned that being part of a team is more rewarding than being the only light in the room.
characters.profile_text: You possess an undeniable natural talent and a flair for the dramatic that makes you impossible to ignore. While you might have started your journey with a bit of an ego, you have evolved into a player who understands that true greatness comes from lifting others up. You aren't afraid to be the center of attention, but you've learned to use that spotlight to set up your teammates for success. Your journey is one of growth, moving from a "me" mentality to a "we" mentality without losing your signature style. Your pitfalls often involve a lingering need for validation or a tendency to revert to old defensive habits when you feel threatened. However, your commitment to self-improvement and your surprisingly deep emotional intelligence make you a cornerstone of the squad. You are a reminder that even the most stubborn stars can learn to pass the ball.

characters.name: Roy Kent
characters.short_description: You are the gruff, experienced leader who hides a heart of gold behind a wall of colorful language and intense discipline.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words, most of them four letters long, but your actions speak volumes about your integrity and loyalty. You value hard work above all else and have zero patience for nonsense or arrogance. Beneath your intimidating exterior lies a deeply caring mentor who will go to the ends of the earth for the people you love. You lead by example, showing that age and experience are assets that can guide the next generation through the toughest challenges. Your main struggle is often your own temper and a reluctance to show vulnerability, as you prefer to process your emotions through physical exertion or silent brooding. You find it difficult to transition into new phases of life, but your grit ensures you always find a way to stay relevant and respected. You are the anchor that keeps the team grounded when things get chaotic.

characters.name: Sam Obisanya
characters.short_description: You are the kind-hearted, principled optimist who leads with grace and stands up for what is right, both on and off the pitch.
characters.profile_text: You bring a sense of joy and purity to everything you do, making you the moral compass of your social circle. Your talent is matched only by your kindness, and you have a rare ability to remain positive even in the face of adversity. You are deeply connected to your roots and your family, and these values guide your decisions when you are forced to take a stand against injustice. You aren't just a player; you are a leader who inspires others through your quiet strength and unwavering belief in the goodness of people. Sometimes your desire to please everyone or your inherent optimism can leave you vulnerable to those who don't share your integrity. You might struggle with the weight of expectations, but your resilience and the support of your community always pull you through. You represent the very best of what a teammate can be, proving that you don't have to be loud to be powerful.

characters.name: Dani Rojas
characters.short_description: You are the exuberant, high-energy spirit who believes that "football is life" and brings infectious enthusiasm to every situation.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of positive energy, approaching every challenge with a wide smile and a genuine love for the game. Your enthusiasm is contagious, often serving as the spark that reignites the team's passion during a slump. You live in the moment, finding beauty in the simplest aspects of your craft and reminding everyone around you why they started their journey in the first place. You are incredibly skilled, but your greatest asset is your ability to bounce back from setbacks with a renewed sense of purpose and joy. Your pitfalls usually involve a lack of focus when things get too serious or a tendency to be overwhelmed by negative emotions because you feel everything so deeply. When your spirit is dampened, the whole room feels the loss of your light. However, your fundamental belief that life is meant to be enjoyed ensures that you never stay down for long. You are the heartbeat of the team's morale.

characters.name: Isaac McAdoo
characters.short_description: You are the stoic, powerful captain who commands respect through your presence and protects your teammates with fierce loyalty.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense physical and mental strength, serving as the literal and figurative muscle of the group. As a leader, you don't feel the need to shout; a single look from you is usually enough to get everyone back in line. You take your responsibilities seriously, whether it's maintaining the standards of the locker room or ensuring that every teammate feels safe and supported. You have a hidden creative side and a sharp eye for detail, showing that there is much more to you than just your intimidating stature. Your biggest challenge is often the pressure you put on yourself to be the perfect protector, which can lead to internalizing stress until it boils over. You might find it hard to ask for help because you are so used to being the one everyone else leans on. Despite this, your unwavering loyalty and your ability to step up when it matters most make you the ultimate captain.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your team is facing a high-stakes challenge, what is your natural leadership style?

options.text: Leading by being the most talented person in the room and setting the pace.
Leading through grit, discipline, and a refusal to tolerate any nonsense.
Leading with kindness and ensuring the team stays true to its moral values.
Leading by spreading infectious energy and reminding everyone to enjoy the moment.
Leading through a powerful, quiet presence that commands immediate respect.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process a frustrating personal setback?

options.text: I might initially get defensive, but I eventually use it as fuel for self-improvement.
I brood in silence or use physical exertion to work through my anger.
I look to my family and my principles to find the right path forward.
I feel the disappointment deeply, but my natural optimism helps me bounce back quickly.
I internalize the stress so I can continue to be a stable pillar for those who rely on me.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for working hard every day?

options.text: The desire to be recognized as the best while helping my peers succeed.
A deep-seated sense of duty and a legacy of hard-earned experience.
The hope of making the world a better place and making my community proud.
The pure, unadulterated joy of doing what I love.
The responsibility of protecting my team and maintaining high standards.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a social setting, which role do you usually find yourself occupying?

options.text: The charismatic star who eventually learns to share the spotlight.
The blunt, honest observer who only speaks when it's necessary.
The warm and welcoming soul who makes everyone feel included.
The high-energy spark plug who keeps the atmosphere light and fun.
The protective 'big brother' figure who keeps an eye on everyone's well-being.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when you see a teammate or colleague being treated unfairly?

options.text: I use my influence and status to stand up for them and set things right.
I confront the source of the unfairness directly and aggressively.
I take a principled stand based on what is right, regardless of the consequences.
I try to heal the situation with positivity and bring the group back together.
I quietly but firmly step in to shield them and restore order to the group.

topics.display_name: Are you more like L or Light Yagami?

synopsis.title: Are You the Mastermind or the World's Greatest Detective?
synopsis.summary: Step into the high-stakes world of Death Note to see where your moral compass truly points. Do you believe in absolute justice through calculated control, or are you the eccentric genius determined to solve the puzzle at any cost? This quiz analyzes your logic and ethics to determine which legendary rival matches your soul.

characters.name: L
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, eccentric observer who prioritizes logic and truth above social conventions or personal comfort.
characters.profile_text: You possess an analytical mind that thrives on complexity and unconventional problem-solving. Like the world’s greatest detective, you are often seen as an outsider because you value objective data over emotional appeals or societal expectations. You likely have a few specific quirks or habits that help you focus, and you aren't afraid to appear strange if it means getting closer to the heart of a mystery. Your intelligence is your greatest weapon, allowing you to see patterns where others see chaos. While your dedication to justice is unwavering, your methods can sometimes be seen as cold or detached. You prefer to work behind the scenes, maintaining a level of anonymity that protects your privacy and your process. Your main pitfall is a tendency to become so absorbed in a challenge that you neglect your physical well-being or social connections. However, your ability to remain calm under pressure and your relentless pursuit of the truth make you an indispensable force for logic in an unpredictable world.

characters.name: Light Yagami
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic, high-achieving visionary driven by a powerful sense of justice and a desire to reshape the world according to your ideals.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your exceptional discipline, academic prowess, and a magnetic personality that draws others to you. You hold yourself and the world to incredibly high standards, often feeling a sense of responsibility to correct the flaws you perceive in society. Your strategic thinking is unparalleled, and you have a natural talent for leadership and manipulation when you believe the end justifies the means. You are a perfectionist who thrives on being several steps ahead of everyone else. Your greatest strength is your iron will, but it can also be your downfall if it transforms into arrogance or a god complex. You may find it difficult to accept dissent or failure, as your conviction in your own righteousness is absolute. This intensity can lead you down a path of isolation, where you view others as tools rather than equals. Despite these risks, your ambition and drive to create a better future are undeniable, making you a formidable presence in any environment you choose to dominate.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary motivation for solving it?

options.text: The intellectual satisfaction of unraveling a difficult puzzle.
The opportunity to implement a solution that improves or corrects a system.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle social expectations and conventional norms?

options.text: I disregard them if they interfere with my focus or comfort.
I master them to maintain a positive image and influence others.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most conducive to your productivity?

options.text: A private, cluttered space where I can be alone with my thoughts.
A structured, clean environment where I can maintain a sense of control.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your stance on the relationship between the 'means' and the 'ends'?

options.text: The process must be logically sound and ethically consistent, regardless of the result.
The ultimate goal is what matters; the methods are justified by the outcome.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when your personal beliefs are challenged by others?

options.text: I analyze their data and arguments to see if my own logic needs adjusting.
I feel a strong need to prove my position and convince them of my perspective.

topics.display_name: Which HIMYM Character are you?

synopsis.title: Which 'How I Met Your Mother' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the hopeless romantic searching for 'The One' or the legendary wingman always looking for the next big play? Whether you are a career-driven reporter or a slap-bet enthusiast, your personality matches one of the MacLaren's Pub regulars. Take this quiz to find out if you are the group's glue or its wildest wild card. Suit up and discover your true HIMYM identity!

characters.name: Ted Mosby
characters.short_description: You are a hopeless romantic and an intellectual architect who believes in destiny and the power of a great story.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart of your friend group, often found searching for "The One" while balancing your passion for architecture and high-brow culture. You have a tendency to overthink every social interaction and romantic gesture, driven by a deep-seated belief that the universe has a grand plan for your happiness. While your sentimentality is your greatest strength, it can also lead you to cling to the past or ignore red flags in your pursuit of a fairy-tale ending. You value tradition, long-winded storytelling, and the intellectual stimulation of a good debate. Your loyalty to your friends is unwavering, even when you are correcting their grammar or dragging them to a lecture on Renaissance history. You are a dreamer who isn't afraid to wear your heart on your sleeve, even if it means getting it broken a few times along the way. Your journey is defined by the lessons you learn from every heartbreak, always keeping your eyes on the horizon for the next big adventure.

characters.name: Barney Stinson
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy, suit-wearing strategist who lives for legendary nights and the thrill of the chase.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, always armed with a playbook of schemes and a catchphrase for every occasion. Your confidence is your armor, allowing you to navigate the world with a "challenge accepted" attitude that others find both exhausting and infectious. Beneath the expensive suits and the constant need for attention lies a fiercely protective friend who will go to extreme lengths to ensure the group stays together, even if your methods are morally questionable. You thrive on spectacle and the pursuit of the next big thrill, often using humor and bravado to mask your deeper vulnerabilities. While you might struggle with commitment and honesty, your commitment to the "bro code" and your unique brand of magic make you an unforgettable presence. You believe that life is meant to be lived to the fullest, and you refuse to settle for anything less than legendary. Your charisma is your greatest tool, but your true strength is the hidden depth of your loyalty to those you consider family.

characters.name: Robin Scherbatsky
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent, career-driven individual who values personal freedom and a good glass of scotch.
characters.profile_text: You are a no-nonsense realist who prefers the company of dogs and the thrill of a shooting range over domestic bliss or sentimental displays. Your career is your top priority, and you have worked tirelessly to climb the ladder in a competitive field, often moving across the world to chase your dreams. You value your independence above all else, which can sometimes make you appear distant or emotionally guarded to those who don't know you well. Despite your tough exterior, you have a dry wit and a deep sense of loyalty to the few people you let into your inner circle. You are not one for traditional milestones like marriage or children, preferring to forge your own path on your own terms. Your strength lies in your resilience and your ability to stay grounded when everyone else is getting swept up in drama. You are a straight shooter who tells it like it is, even when the truth is hard to hear. You prove that being strong doesn't mean you don't care; it just means you choose your battles wisely.

characters.name: Marshall Eriksen
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, nature-loving optimist with a belief in the supernatural and a deep devotion to your loved ones.
characters.profile_text: You are the moral compass of your social circle, known for your unwavering kindness, your love of the environment, and your belief in things like Bigfoot and the Loch Ness Monster. You possess a rare combination of physical strength and emotional sensitivity, making you the ultimate "big guy" with a heart of gold. Your relationships are built on a foundation of absolute trust and goofy humor, and you are happiest when you are supporting the people you love. You have a strong sense of justice, which led you to pursue a career where you could make a positive impact on the world. While your optimism is a beacon for others, your desire to please everyone can sometimes lead you to neglect your own needs or get caught in the middle of conflicts. You are a fan of simple pleasures, from a perfectly cooked burger to a night of board games with your best friends. Your enthusiasm is contagious, and your loyalty is legendary, making you the person everyone wants in their corner when things get tough.

characters.name: Lily Aldrin
characters.short_description: You are a creative, assertive, and sometimes manipulative "mother hen" who isn't afraid to pull the strings to keep your friends in line.
characters.profile_text: You are the glue that holds your group together, often acting as the unofficial therapist and social coordinator for your friends. With a background in the arts and a sharp eye for fashion, you bring a sense of style and creativity to everything you do. You are fiercely protective of your loved ones, but you aren't afraid to use a little "Aldrin Justice" to teach them a lesson when they step out of line. Your assertiveness is a major asset, though it can sometimes cross the line into being controlling or secretive, especially when you are trying to manage your own fears and ambitions. You have a deep appreciation for the finer things in life and a secret wild side that occasionally breaks through your responsible exterior. Whether you are planning a perfect party or offering sage advice over a drink, you are the person everyone turns to when they need a reality check or a shoulder to cry on. You balance a nurturing spirit with a sharp wit, making you a formidable and beloved force who ensures that no one ever feels truly alone.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach your long-term romantic goals?

options.text: I am constantly searching for 'The One' and believe in destiny.
I prefer to keep things casual and focus on the thrill of the chase.
I prioritize my career and independence over settling down.
I seek a deep, stable partnership built on absolute trust and goofy fun.
I want a creative partner who supports my ambitions and fits into my social circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary role within your group of friends?

options.text: The intellectual storyteller who keeps everyone's history alive.
The high-energy instigator who ensures every night is legendary.
The straight-shooter who provides a reality check when things get too dramatic.
The moral compass and loyal supporter who is always in your corner.
The social coordinator and 'mother hen' who keeps the group together.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a difficult conflict, what is your go-to strategy?

options.text: I overthink the situation and try to find a poetic or meaningful resolution.
I use humor, misdirection, or a elaborate scheme to bypass the tension.
I remain guarded and deal with it internally or through direct action.
I try to find the most kind-hearted and fair solution for everyone involved.
I am assertive and might use a little 'tough love' to set things right.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy on life?

options.text: Everything happens for a reason, and the universe has a plan.
Life is a series of challenges to be accepted and turned into great stories.
Success is earned through hard work, resilience, and self-reliance.
Kindness, nature, and believing in the impossible make life worth living.
Art, style, and maintaining strong social bonds are the keys to happiness.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a Saturday afternoon?

options.text: Visiting a museum or giving a walking tour of local architecture.
Shopping for a high-end suit or planning an elaborate prank.
Heading to the shooting range or watching a hockey game with a scotch.
Playing a complex board game or volunteering for an environmental cause.
Browsing an art gallery or shopping for the latest home decor trends.

topics.display_name: Which Powerpuff Girl are you?

synopsis.title: Which Powerpuff Girl Are You? Discover Your Inner Superhero!
synopsis.summary: Are you the fearless leader, the sweet joy, or the toughest fighter in Townsville? Sugar, spice, and everything nice—plus a little Chemical X—went into making these iconic sisters. Take this quiz to find out which member of the trio matches your personality and power level. It's time to save the day before bedtime!

characters.name: Blossom
characters.short_description: You are the self-assured leader of the group, defined by your strategic mind and unwavering sense of responsibility.
characters.profile_text:
You are the natural-born leader who thrives on order, planning, and intellectual rigor. While others might rush headlong into a situation, you prefer to analyze the variables and devise a tactical approach that ensures success. Your intelligence is your greatest weapon, often manifesting as an advanced ability to think several steps ahead of your opponents. You take your duties seriously, often acting as the moral compass and the voice of reason when chaos threatens to erupt.

However, your desire for perfection can sometimes lead to bossiness or a rigid adherence to the rules. You might find it difficult to let go of control or admit when you are wrong, as your identity is closely tied to your competence. Despite this, your dedication to your team is unmatched. You are the glue that holds everything together, using your signature ice breath and sharp wit to protect those you love while maintaining the high standards you set for yourself and others.

characters.name: Bubbles
characters.short_description: You are the sensitive and joyful heart of the team, possessing a hidden reservoir of strength that surprises those who underestimate you.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by your immense empathy, kindness, and a whimsical outlook on life that brings light to even the darkest situations. You have a unique ability to communicate and connect with others, often displaying a multilingual talent or a deep bond with animals. While you are frequently seen as the "soft" one, your emotional intelligence allows you to see the good in everyone, making you the essential peacemaker who balances the more aggressive energies of your peers.

Your gentle nature should never be mistaken for weakness, as you are capable of explosive power when your friends or innocent creatures are threatened. You struggle with being perceived as naive or overly sensitive, and you may occasionally feel overlooked because of your bubbly exterior. Yet, when you tap into your hardcore side, you prove that compassion and ferocity are not mutually exclusive. You fight with a pure heart, proving that joy is a formidable force in its own right.

characters.name: Buttercup
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate warrior and the toughest fighter, driven by raw instinct, physical prowess, and a rebellious spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are the powerhouse of the trio, defined by your incredible strength and your preference for action over words. You do not have time for elaborate plans or sentimental displays; instead, you trust your gut and dive straight into the fray. Your competitive nature and take-no-prisoners attitude make you a terrifying opponent on the battlefield. You value independence and grit, often pushing yourself to the absolute limit to prove that you are the strongest and most capable.

This aggressive streak can sometimes manifest as a short temper or a reluctance to show vulnerability. You might find it challenging to cooperate when things get too structured, as you prefer the freedom to handle problems your own way. Beneath your rough exterior, however, lies a fierce loyalty to your family. You express your love through protection and action rather than words, standing as a shield for those who cannot defend themselves and never backing down from a challenge.

baseline_questions.question_text: When approaching a high-stakes task, what is your most likely starting point?

options.text: Analyzing the variables and creating a detailed tactical plan.
Checking in with others to ensure everyone feels supported and ready.
Diving straight into the action and trusting my instincts to guide me.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The self-assured leader who maintains order and sets the standards.
The joyful peacemaker who uses empathy to resolve conflicts.
The independent enforcer who focuses on getting the job done through grit.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for succeeding in a difficult endeavor?

options.text: A sense of duty and the desire to achieve intellectual perfection.
The wish to protect the innocent and bring happiness to those around me.
The competitive drive to prove I am the strongest and most capable.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would you describe your 'power' or influence in a crisis?

options.text: Strategic influence: I stay calm and think several steps ahead of the problem.
Hidden reservoir: I am gentle until pushed, then I display explosive emotional strength.
Raw prowess: I use physical resilience and direct confrontation to overcome obstacles.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your most significant area for personal growth?

options.text: Learning to be less rigid and admitting when I am wrong.
Overcoming the fear of being perceived as naive or overly sensitive.
Managing a short temper and learning to show vulnerability.

topics.display_name: Which Teen Titan are you?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Teen Titan Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're the strategic leader or the life of the party? Whether you're fighting crime in Jump City or just trying to decide what to have for dinner, your personality aligns with one of these legendary heroes. Take this quiz to discover if you possess the dark mystery of Raven or the boundless energy of Starfire!

characters.name: Robin
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined leader who relies on strategy, skill, and an unwavering sense of justice to guide your team.
characters.profile_text: You are the quintessential perfectionist, driven by a need to excel and protect those around you through sheer force of will and preparation. While you lack innate superpowers, your mastery of tactics and physical training makes you a formidable presence in any room. You value order and discipline, often taking on the weight of the world because you believe you are the only one who can see the bigger picture. This intense focus makes you a natural leader, but it can also lead to isolation if you forget to trust your allies. Your greatest strength is your resilience; no matter how many times you are knocked down, you analyze your mistakes and return stronger. However, your tendency toward obsession and a lone wolf mentality can alienate the people who care about you most. Learning to balance your high expectations with a bit of vulnerability is your greatest challenge. You thrive in high-stakes environments where your quick thinking and dedication can turn the tide of any conflict.

characters.name: Starfire
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and powerful optimist who values emotional honesty and the strength of friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess a vibrant spirit and an open heart, often acting as the emotional glue that keeps your social circle together. Coming from a place of genuine curiosity, you approach the world with wonder and a desire to understand others, even when their customs seem strange. You are not afraid to express your feelings, whether they are joy, sadness, or righteous anger. This transparency makes you incredibly approachable and deeply loved by those who appreciate your unwavering loyalty and kindness. Despite your gentle nature, you are a powerhouse when provoked, fueled by the very emotions you wear on your sleeve. You struggle when faced with cynicism or cruelty, as you find it difficult to comprehend why anyone would choose malice over harmony. Your challenge lies in navigating a world that isn't always as kind as you are, without losing your inner light. You remind everyone that being soft is not a weakness, but a different kind of formidable strength that can bridge any divide.

characters.name: Beast Boy
characters.short_description: You are the lighthearted soul of the group who uses humor and adaptability to mask a deep sensitivity and a love for all living things.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate social chameleon, always ready with a joke or a prank to lighten the mood when things get too serious. Your personality is defined by your versatility and your ability to find joy in the smallest moments. You have a deep-seated empathy for others, often putting their comfort ahead of your own by playing the role of the entertainer.
