While you might seem carefree on the surface, this playfulness often hides a complex inner life and a desire for acceptance and belonging. Your adaptability is your greatest asset, allowing you to fit into almost any situation and connect with a wide variety of people. However, your fear of being seen as too serious can sometimes prevent you from addressing your own needs or being taken seriously when it matters most. You are at your best when you embrace your unique perspective and realize that your ability to bring a smile to someone's face is a vital service. You teach others that even in the darkest times, there is always room for a little fun and a lot of heart.

characters.name: Raven
characters.short_description: You are a reserved and introspective individual who possesses immense inner power and a sharp, dry wit.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of profound depth and quiet intensity, often preferring the sanctuary of your own mind to the chaos of the outside world. Because your emotions are tied to your incredible power, you have learned the art of extreme self-control and stoicism. This can make you appear distant or even cold to those who don't know you well, but beneath that calm exterior lies a fiercely protective heart and a dry sense of humor that rewards those patient enough to earn your trust. You value solitude and intellectual pursuits, finding peace in meditation or study. Your struggle is one of balance; you must constantly manage the darkness within while trying to connect with the light of others. You are often the voice of reason in a crisis, providing a grounded perspective when everyone else is losing their heads. By accepting that your emotions are a source of strength rather than a threat, you unlock your true potential and find a sense of belonging that you often deny yourself. You prove that there is great power in silence and reflection.

characters.name: Cyborg
characters.short_description: You are a tech-savvy powerhouse who balances a love for innovation and fun with a resilient spirit and a big heart.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of blending logic with passion, often serving as the backbone of your team through your technical expertise and physical strength. You take pride in your skills and your ability to build or fix anything, seeing the world as a series of challenges to be solved with a bit of grease and a lot of heart. You enjoy the finer things in life—good food, loud music, and the company of friends—and you aren't afraid to be the loudest voice in the room when it's time to celebrate. However, your journey hasn't always been easy, and you carry the weight of your past experiences with a quiet dignity. You sometimes struggle with your identity, wondering where the machine ends and the person begins, but you always land on the side of humanity. Your loyalty is absolute, and you will go to any lengths to protect your family. You represent the perfect fusion of modern capability and timeless spirit, proving that what makes you different is exactly what makes you indispensable to those around you.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a leadership role within a group?

options.text: I take charge immediately, focusing on strategy and discipline to ensure success.
I lead through empathy, ensuring everyone feels heard and valued.
I prefer to keep things light and use humor to boost the group's morale.
I avoid the spotlight, offering calm, logical insights only when necessary.
I act as the reliable backbone, using my technical skills to solve practical problems.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary method for dealing with high-stress situations?

options.text: I analyze the problem and create a rigorous plan of action.
I lean on my friends and express my feelings openly.
I try to find the silver lining or make a joke to break the tension.
I retreat into quiet reflection to maintain my internal balance.
I focus on the task at hand and use my physical or mental strength to push through.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My unwavering dedication and work ethic.
My capacity for compassion and kindness.
My ability to adapt to any situation and have fun.
My intellectual depth and self-control.
My loyalty and practical ingenuity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to spend your downtime when you aren't working?

options.text: Training or studying to improve my skills.
Exploring new places and meeting new people.
Playing games or hanging out with a large group of friends.
Reading, meditating, or enjoying some much-needed solitude.
Working on a personal project or enjoying a favorite meal.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest social challenge?

options.text: I can be too perfectionistic and demanding of others.
I sometimes struggle to understand why people are cynical or mean.
I worry that people won't take me seriously if I stop joking.
I find it difficult to open up and let people get close to me.
I sometimes feel like an outsider despite my contributions.

topics.display_name: Which Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle are you?

synopsis.title: Which Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the fearless leader or the party animal of the group? Whether you're a tech genius or a hot-headed rebel, there's a turtle that perfectly mirrors your personality. Take this quiz to find out which hero in a half-shell you truly are!

characters.name: Leonardo
characters.short_description: You are the disciplined leader who prioritizes honor, strategy, and the well-being of your team above all else.
characters.profile_text: You embody the spirit of the bushido code, finding your strength in structure and a clear sense of duty. As a natural leader, you often carry the weight of responsibility on your shoulders, constantly striving for perfection in your skills and your character. You are the one your friends look to when a plan is needed, trusting your calm demeanor and tactical mind to guide them through the toughest challenges. Your dedication to your craft is unmatched, and you likely find peace in meditation or rigorous practice. However, your greatest strength can also be your pitfall. You may struggle with the pressure of high expectations, sometimes becoming overly rigid or self-critical when things do not go according to plan. Learning to balance your serious nature with a bit of spontaneity is your lifelong journey. Despite this, your unwavering loyalty and moral compass make you the bedrock of your social circle, ensuring that everyone stays on the right path.

characters.name: Michelangelo
characters.short_description: You are the free-spirited optimist who brings joy and creativity to every situation with your infectious energy.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart and soul of the group, possessing a rare ability to find light even in the darkest of times. Your approach to life is defined by a love for fun, a vivid imagination, and a deep appreciation for the simple pleasures, like a perfect slice of pizza or a new video game. You do not let the stresses of the world weigh you down, preferring to live in the moment and keep your friends laughing with your quick wit and playful antics. While others might see you as distracted, your creativity allows you to think outside the box and find unconventional solutions that more rigid minds might miss. Your social battery is high, and you thrive when you are surrounded by people who appreciate your unique perspective. The challenge you face is often one of focus; your desire for constant stimulation can lead to procrastination or a lack of discipline when serious matters arise. By grounding your boundless energy with a bit of focus, you become an unstoppable force of positivity. You remind everyone that life is meant to be enjoyed, making you an indispensable part of any team.

characters.name: Donatello
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant intellectual who uses logic, technology, and innovation to solve complex problems and support your peers.
characters.profile_text: You possess a mind that is always three steps ahead, constantly analyzing the world through a lens of science and mechanics. Whether you are tinkering with a new gadget or deconstructing a difficult theory, your curiosity is your primary driver. You value knowledge and efficiency, often preferring the quiet focus of a workshop or a library to the chaos of the front lines. Your friends rely on your expertise to navigate technical hurdles, and you take great pride in being the one who provides the tools and insights necessary for success. You are patient and methodical, believing that every problem has a rational solution if one looks hard enough. Your intellectual depth is your greatest asset, but it can sometimes lead to a sense of isolation. You might find it difficult to communicate your complex ideas to those who do not share your technical background, or you may get so lost in the details that you lose sight of the emotional landscape around you. When you bridge the gap between your logic and your heart, you offer a level of support that is both practical and profound. Your brilliance ensures that no obstacle is truly insurmountable.

characters.name: Raphael
characters.short_description: You are the fierce protector whose intense passion and raw strength are fueled by a deep sense of justice and loyalty.
characters.profile_text: You wear your heart on your sleeve, driven by powerful emotions and a fierce independent streak. You are never one to back down from a fight, especially when it comes to defending those you care about or standing up against unfairness. Your physical presence and bold attitude often make you the vanguard of any group, as you are willing to take the risks that others might hesitate to face. Underneath your tough exterior lies a deeply sensitive soul that feels things more intensely than most, which is why your loyalty is so absolute. You value authenticity and have little patience for pretense or bureaucracy. This intensity is a double-edged sword, however. Your temper can sometimes cloud your judgment, leading to impulsive decisions or unnecessary conflict with those you love. You may struggle with feelings of being misunderstood, pushing others away when you actually need them most. Learning to channel your fire into constructive action rather than raw aggression is your greatest challenge. When you master your inner turmoil, your strength becomes a protective shield that keeps your family safe and your enemies at bay.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a group project or collective task begins, what is your primary focus?

options.text: Establishing a clear strategy and ensuring everyone knows their role.
Finding the most efficient technical solution or tool to solve the problem.
Taking immediate action and tackling the hardest part of the job first.
Keeping the atmosphere light and making sure everyone is having a good time.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process a significant setback or failure?

options.text: I reflect on my mistakes and double my efforts to improve my discipline.
I analyze the data to understand the root cause and prevent it from happening again.
I feel a surge of frustration and need a physical outlet to vent my energy.
I try to find the silver lining and move on quickly to something more fun.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most restorative for your mental well-being?

options.text: A quiet, structured space where I can practice a skill or meditate.
A workshop or lab filled with interesting projects and information.
A high-energy setting where I can test my limits or blow off steam.
A vibrant social gathering with games, food, and plenty of laughter.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most common approach to interpersonal conflict?

options.text: I act as the mediator, seeking a solution that maintains group harmony.
I use logic and objective facts to de-escalate the situation.
I am direct and confrontational, speaking my mind regardless of the tension.
I use humor to diffuse the stress and distract people from the argument.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Integrity and the ability to lead by example.
Intelligence and the ability to innovate.
Passion and the courage to protect others.
Optimism and the ability to inspire joy.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Witcher' Path are you on?

synopsis.title: Which 'The Witcher' Character Are You Destined To Be?
synopsis.summary: Toss a coin to your Witcher and find out where your destiny lies across the Continent. Whether you are a monster hunter with a stoic heart or a powerful sorceress pulling the strings of empires, your choices define your path. Take this quiz to see if you are a lone wolf, a loyal companion, or a child of surprise in this dark fantasy world.

characters.name: Geralt of Rivia
characters.short_description: You are a stoic, battle-hardened professional who navigates a morally gray world with a strict personal code.
characters.profile_text: You are a man of few words but immense action, often finding yourself caught between the lesser of two evils. Your life is defined by discipline, physical prowess, and a cynical exterior that masks a deeply rooted sense of justice. You prefer the company of your horse and the quiet of the trail to the noise of courtly politics, relying on your heightened senses and rigorous training to survive the most lethal encounters. While others see a cold mutant, your loyalty to those you love is unshakable and fierce. Your tendency to remain neutral often draws you into the very conflicts you try to avoid, and your emotional guardedness can alienate those who care for you. You struggle with the weight of destiny, often feeling like a pawn in a game played by kings and mages. Despite your rugged independence, your greatest strength lies in your hidden capacity for compassion and the fatherly bond you share with those you've sworn to protect.

characters.name: Yennefer of Vengerberg
characters.short_description: You are a powerful, sophisticated sorceress who commands respect through sheer will and unmatched magical talent.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp intellect and a refined taste for the finer things in life, never settling for anything less than excellence. Your past has forged you into a woman of steel, one who hides her vulnerabilities behind a mask of cold confidence and biting wit. You are fiercely independent and highly ambitious, often willing to cross lines that others fear to touch in order to achieve your goals or protect your family. Your presence is magnetic, demanding attention the moment you enter a room. Your desire for control and your prickly exterior can make you appear distant or even manipulative to those who don't know you well. You often carry the burden of your secrets alone, fearing that showing weakness will undermine your hard-won authority. However, beneath the lilac and gooseberries lies a heart capable of profound sacrifice and a maternal instinct that drives you to move mountains for the people you hold dear.

characters.name: Ciri
characters.short_description: You are a child of destiny possessing immense power and a rebellious spirit that refuses to be tamed by any crown.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and potential, constantly evolving as you navigate a world that seeks to use your gifts for its own ends. Your life has been a series of escapes and discoveries, teaching you to be resourceful, brave, and fiercely protective of your freedom. You value authenticity above all else and have little patience for the stuffy traditions of royalty or the rigid rules of magic. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you learn to master the chaotic forces within you while staying true to your own moral compass. Your impulsive nature and thirst for adventure can lead you into dangerous situations where your power might spiral out of control. You often feel the heavy weight of expectations, struggling to balance your desire for a normal life with the reality of your world-shaping heritage. Despite the many who wish to claim you, your true strength comes from your resilience and the deep, found-family connections you have forged across the Continent.

characters.name: Dandelion
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic troubadour and loyal friend who uses wit and song to navigate the dangers of the world.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of every party, a master of words who can turn a simple skirmish into an epic legend with a few strokes of your lute. Your charm is your greatest weapon, allowing you to talk your way into high society and out of dungeon cells with equal ease. You have an unquenchable thirst for romance and beauty, often finding inspiration in the most unlikely places. While others focus on the grim realities of war and monsters, you remind the world of the importance of art, laughter, and a well-told story. Your vanity and tendency to exaggerate can sometimes land you and your companions in hot water, as your mouth often moves faster than your common sense. You may be perceived as shallow or flighty, but your loyalty to your friends is absolute, even when it requires you to step far outside your comfort zone. Behind the flamboyant outfits and poetic verses is a man who understands the human heart better than most, making you an indispensable confidant.

characters.name: Triss Merigold
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and idealistic mage who balances political savvy with a genuine desire to help others.
characters.profile_text: You are known for your warmth and your ability to find common ground even in the most heated disputes. Unlike many of your peers, you retain a sense of optimism and a moral clarity that guides your use of magic toward the greater good. You are a skilled healer and a formidable strategist, often acting as the voice of reason in chaotic situations. Your bravery is quiet but steadfast, showing itself most clearly when you stand up for the marginalized or risk your life for the people you love. Your kindness can sometimes be mistaken for weakness, and your desire to please others may lead you to compromise your own needs or get caught in the crossfire of larger power struggles. You occasionally struggle with feelings of inadequacy compared to more dominant personalities, yet your inner strength is undeniable. You are a beacon of hope in a cynical age, proving that one can navigate the murky waters of politics without losing their soul or their capacity for genuine affection.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a dangerous dispute, how do you typically react?

options.text: I assess the threat and handle it with cold, calculated efficiency.
I take command of the situation using my intellect and presence.
I rely on my instincts to find a way out or fight my way through.
I use my wit and charm to de-escalate or distract.
I try to mediate and find a solution that helps the most people.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a quiet evening?

options.text: Tending to my gear and preparing for the next day's work.
Enjoying a glass of fine wine in a luxurious, private setting.
Exploring somewhere new or hanging out with close, trusted friends.
Performing for a crowd or being the center of a lively gathering.
Helping a friend in need or working on a project for the community.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My unwavering discipline and adherence to my own rules.
My ambition and the power I have worked hard to achieve.
My independence and my refusal to be controlled by others.
My creativity and my ability to see the beauty in everything.
My empathy and my commitment to doing what is right.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle your deepest vulnerabilities?

options.text: I bury them under a cynical exterior and focus on the task at hand.
I hide them behind a mask of confidence and never let them show.
I struggle with them but stay resilient, moving forward regardless.
I turn them into stories or jokes to make them easier to carry.
I share them with those I trust, seeking connection and support.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary role within a group?

options.text: The protector who does the dirty work no one else wants to do.
The strategist who makes the hard decisions and leads the way.
The wild card who brings energy and challenges the status quo.
The morale booster who keeps everyone’s spirits high with humor.
The peacemaker who ensures everyone is cared for and heard.

topics.display_name: What is your signature Pokémon Type?

synopsis.title: Which Pokémon Type Matches Your True Personality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered which elemental energy flows through your veins? Whether you are a fiery leader or a calm water-type soul, your personality aligns with one of the eighteen iconic types. Take this quiz to discover your signature Pokémon type and see how you would fare in the world of pocket monsters!

characters.name: Normal
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and adaptable individual who finds strength in simplicity and a wide range of potential talents.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an incredible capacity for growth and flexibility, much like the Normal type’s ability to learn a vast array of moves. You don't feel the need to fit into a specific niche or rely on flashy elemental powers to make your mark. Instead, you rely on your well-rounded nature and consistent reliability. People often turn to you because you are approachable and stable, capable of handling diverse situations without being overwhelmed by specialized pressures. Your presence is a grounding force that keeps groups together through your sheer dependability.

Your greatest strength lies in your lack of glaring weaknesses, allowing you to navigate life with a steady hand. However, you might sometimes feel like you lack a signature spark or a definitive edge in highly competitive environments. Your pitfall is a tendency to blend into the background or play it too safe to avoid conflict. By embracing your inherent versatility, you can master almost any skill you set your mind to, proving that being normal is actually a superpower of its own. You are the ultimate jack-of-all-trades who can thrive anywhere.

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and high-energy person who thrives on intensity and leaves a lasting impression on everyone you meet.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a burning inner fire that fuels your ambitions and social interactions. When you walk into a room, your presence is immediately felt, radiating warmth and a certain degree of intensity that draws others toward you. You are not one to do things halfway; whether it is a hobby, a career goal, or a relationship, you pour your entire soul into it. This passion makes you a natural leader and a fierce competitor who isn't afraid to take risks to achieve victory. You live for the moments that make your heart race.

While your energy is infectious, it can occasionally become overwhelming for those around you if not tempered. You might struggle with a short temper or a tendency to burn out quickly after a period of high activity. Your challenge is to learn how to sustain your flame without consuming everything in your path or exhausting your own resources. When you find that balance, your ability to inspire and motivate others is unmatched, making you a beacon of light and warmth in any community. You are the spark that starts the greatest movements.

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a fluid and resilient individual who can adapt to any container life places you in while maintaining a deep emotional core.
characters.profile_text:
You embody the qualities of the ocean: calm and serene on the surface, yet possessing immense depth and hidden power underneath. You are naturally empathetic and intuitive, often sensing the needs of others before they even speak. This makes you an excellent mediator and a loyal friend who provides a safe harbor for those in distress. You understand that life is a series of ebbs and flows, and you have developed the patience to wait for the right moment to act rather than forcing your will upon the world.

Your strength is your resilience; like water, you can be diverted but never truly stopped. You find clever ways around obstacles that others might find insurmountable. However, your deep emotional nature can sometimes lead to moodiness or a tendency to get lost in your own thoughts. You may find it difficult to set firm boundaries, as your desire to accommodate others can leave you feeling drained. By staying true to your inner current and trusting your intuition, you remain a powerful force for healing and change in a chaotic world.

characters.name: Grass
characters.short_description: You are a nurturing and patient soul who finds strength in growth, harmony, and a deep connection to the world around you.
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural affinity for the rhythms of life and a profound appreciation for the environment. You are often the caretaker in your social circle, providing the support and nourishment others need to flourish. Your approach to life is methodical and steady; you understand that the best things take time to grow and cannot be rushed. This patience allows you to build lasting foundations in your personal and professional life, ensuring that your successes are rooted in something substantial and meaningful. You find beauty in the small, quiet moments of progress.

Your connection to nature often means you value peace and sustainability over rapid, chaotic progress. While this makes you a calming presence, you may sometimes struggle to defend yourself against more aggressive personalities. You might find it hard to step out of your comfort zone or adapt to environments that feel sterile or disconnected from your values. By remembering that even the softest grass can eventually crack through concrete, you can find the inner strength to persist through any hardship while maintaining your gentle spirit. You are the life-giver who ensures the future is bright.

characters.name: Electric
characters.short_description: You are a fast-paced and innovative thinker who thrives on excitement, speed, and the spark of new ideas.
characters.profile_text:
You live life at a high frequency, always looking for the next big thrill or the most efficient way to solve a problem. Your mind moves quickly, often jumping from one brilliant idea to the next before others can even keep up. This mental agility makes you incredibly resourceful and a fantastic person to have around during a crisis. You bring a sense of urgency and excitement to everything you do, ensuring that life never feels stagnant or boring when you are involved. You are the catalyst for change and the driver of modern progress.

Your primary strength is your speed and your ability to strike with precision when an opportunity arises. However, this high-voltage lifestyle can lead to restlessness and a lack of focus if you don't have a clear outlet for your energy. You might find it difficult to slow down and enjoy the quiet moments, always feeling the need to be on and active. Learning to ground yourself is essential to prevent short-circuiting your own well-being. When you channel your energy effectively, you become a literal powerhouse of innovation, lighting up the world with your unique vision.

characters.name: Ice
characters.short_description: You are a composed and crystalline individual who possesses a sharp intellect and a unique, often misunderstood perspective.
characters.profile_text:
You carry yourself with a certain elegance and coolness that can be mistaken for detachment, but it is actually a sign of your intense focus and clarity. You see the world through a sharp lens, noticing details and patterns that others frequently overlook. Like a glacier, you are a formidable presence—quiet and slow-moving but possessing an unstoppable momentum once you are set on a path. You value honesty and precision, preferring the cold, hard truth over comforting illusions, which makes you a person of high integrity.

Your greatest asset is your ability to remain calm under pressure, providing a steadying influence when things get heated. You are often the voice of reason in chaotic situations, standing firm when others falter. However, your preference for logic and distance can sometimes make you appear unapproachable or fragile in the face of emotional warmth. You may struggle with feelings of isolation or the sense that you are brittle when faced with sudden, jarring change. By embracing the beauty of your unique perspective, you can show the world that there is immense strength in your crystalline resolve and quiet dignity.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, unexpected obstacle, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Confront it immediately with everything I've got.
Adjust my course and flow around the problem.
Wait patiently for the right moment to act.
Find a quick, unconventional way to bypass it.
Analyze the situation logically to find the most efficient path.
Use a practical, well-rounded approach to handle it.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your primary drive in life?

options.text: To ignite change and lead others toward a goal.
To provide a sense of calm and emotional depth.
To nurture growth and maintain harmony.
To innovate and keep things moving at a fast pace.
To seek truth and maintain a clear, focused perspective.
To be a reliable and versatile presence for others.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your closest friends describe your presence in a room?

options.text: Warm, intense, and impossible to ignore.
Serene, intuitive, and deeply empathetic.
Steady, supportive, and naturally calming.
Energetic, quick-witted, and full of ideas.
Composed, intellectual, and slightly reserved.
Friendly, adaptable, and easy to talk to.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred method for resolving a disagreement?

options.text: I express my feelings directly and passionately.
I try to understand everyone's emotions and mediate.
I look for the most peaceful and sustainable solution.
I look for a fast, clever way to move past the issue.
I remain objective and focus on the facts of the matter.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which type of environment do you feel most at home?

options.text: Somewhere vibrant, competitive, and full of energy.
Somewhere tranquil, fluid, and emotionally resonant.
