topics.display_name: The Office Character

synopsis.title: Which Dunder Mifflin Employee Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're the World's Best Boss or the Assistant to the Regional Manager? Whether you're pulling elaborate pranks or just trying to make it through the workday without a meeting, your personality says a lot about your desk placement. Take this quiz to find out which iconic Dunder Mifflin staffer matches your vibe!

characters.name: Michael Scott
characters.short_description: You are the well-meaning but socially awkward Regional Manager who craves connection and validation above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess an irrepressible need to be liked, often leading you to prioritize office camaraderie and elaborate pranks over actual productivity. While your management style is unconventional and frequently cringeworthy, your heart is usually in the right place, driven by a deep-seated desire to see your coworkers as a surrogate family. You are a dreamer who finds magic in the mundane, though your lack of self-awareness can lead to significant professional and social blunders. Your greatest strength is your resilience and your capacity for genuine, if misplaced, affection. You often struggle with boundaries and professional decorum, yet your loyalty to Dunder Mifflin is unmatched. You thrive when you feel like the center of attention and wither when faced with cold, hard logic or rejection. Ultimately, you are a sentimental soul who just wants everyone to have a good time, even if it means making a fool of yourself in the process.

characters.name: Dwight Schrute
characters.short_description: You are the intensely loyal, rule-abiding Assistant to the Regional Manager with a passion for beet farming and martial arts.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by an unwavering commitment to hierarchy, authority, and the survivalist skills necessary to thrive in any environment. Your work ethic is unparalleled, and you take immense pride in your status as a top salesman, even if your social skills are somewhat lacking. You value tradition, discipline, and the security of your family farm, often viewing the world through a lens of efficiency and preparedness. While you can be rigid and overly competitive, your loyalty to those you respect is absolute. Your pitfalls often involve a lack of empathy and a tendency to take things far too literally, which can alienate your colleagues. However, beneath your stern exterior lies a man of surprising depth and a fierce protective instinct for your friends. You are the ultimate second-in-command, always ready to defend the office from perceived threats, whether they are fire hazards or corporate downsizing.

characters.name: Jim Halpert
characters.short_description: You are the charming, laid-back salesman who uses humor and elaborate pranks to navigate the boredom of the corporate world.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your quick wit and your ability to find amusement in the most tedious situations. While you are talented and capable, you often find it difficult to fully commit to a career that doesn't inspire you, preferring to spend your energy on creative pranks or pursuing the person you love. You are a natural observer, often breaking the fourth wall with a look that says everything your words don't. Your strengths lie in your relatability and your emotional intelligence, making you a stabilizing force in a chaotic office. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward complacency; you might stay in a comfortable situation longer than you should because you fear the vulnerability of trying for something more. You value genuine connection over professional accolades and are often the voice of reason when things get out of hand. Your easygoing nature makes you well-liked, but your occasional lack of ambition can be a double-edged sword.

characters.name: Pam Beesly
characters.short_description: You are the kind-hearted and artistic receptionist who eventually finds her voice and the courage to pursue her true passions.
characters.profile_text: You are a gentle soul with a quiet strength that often goes unnoticed by those around you. For a long time, you may have felt stuck in a routine or a relationship that didn't allow you to grow, but you possess a resilient spirit that eventually leads you to advocate for yourself. You are observant and empathetic, often acting as the emotional glue that holds the office together. Your artistic sensibilities give you a unique perspective on the world, and you find beauty in the small, everyday moments of life. Your primary struggle is overcoming your own shyness and the fear of failure. You sometimes prioritize others' comfort over your own needs, which can lead to feelings of being overlooked. However, as you gain confidence, you prove to be a formidable and creative individual who isn't afraid to take risks for the sake of your happiness and your family. You are the heart of the office, providing a sense of normalcy and warmth.

characters.name: Angela Martin
characters.short_description: You are the stern, cat-loving head of accounting who values order, morality, and strict adherence to the rules.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of high standards and even higher expectations, often finding yourself frustrated by the perceived incompetence or lack of decorum in others. You take your responsibilities very seriously and find comfort in the structure of accounting and the clear boundaries of your moral code. Your love for your cats and your commitment to your beliefs are the cornerstones of your identity, providing you with a sense of purpose in a world you often find chaotic. You can be judgmental and cold, which makes it difficult for others to get close to you. Your tendency to hold grudges and your rigid nature are your biggest pitfalls, often preventing you from experiencing the joy of spontaneity. However, your discipline and attention to detail make you an essential part of any team. Beneath your icy exterior is a woman who values loyalty and tradition, and while you may not show it often, you are capable of deep devotion to those who meet your exacting criteria.

characters.name: Kevin Malone
characters.short_description: You are the lovable, slow-paced accountant with a passion for food, gambling, and simple pleasures.
characters.profile_text: You are a man of simple tastes and a big heart, often finding joy in things that others might overlook. While you may not be the fastest thinker in the room, your unique logic and occasional flashes of brilliance make you an indispensable, if confusing, member of the team. You are generally easygoing and hard to offend, preferring to spend your time thinking about your next meal or a potential bet rather than worrying about office politics. Your strengths lie in your authenticity and your ability to remain unfazed by the drama surrounding you. Your pitfalls include a lack of professional focus and a tendency to simplify complex problems to the point of absurdity. You are often the comic relief in stressful situations, bringing a sense of levity with your deadpan delivery and genuine enthusiasm for the things you love. Though you might struggle with the finer points of accounting, your presence provides a sense of uncomplicated honesty that is rare in a corporate environment.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a chaotic situation at work?

options.text: I try to lighten the mood with a joke or a distraction.
I immediately take charge and enforce strict protocols.
I observe from the sidelines and wait for it to blow over.
I feel anxious and try to keep the peace between everyone.
I express my disapproval of the lack of professionalism.
I don't really notice the chaos; I'm focused on my own tasks.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for performing well at your job?

options.text: The desire to be loved and admired by my peers.
The pursuit of power, authority, and career advancement.
The need to provide for my personal life and hobbies.
The satisfaction of being helpful and creative.
The adherence to a strict personal and moral work ethic.
The simple goal of finishing so I can relax or eat.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your social role within a group?

options.text: The enthusiastic entertainer who wants to be the center of attention.
The intense enforcer who ensures everyone follows the rules.
The witty commentator who stays slightly detached.
The supportive listener who avoids direct confrontation.
The critical observer who maintains high standards for others.
The easygoing friend who just goes with the flow.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you feel about following traditional rules and corporate hierarchy?

options.text: Rules are suggestions that get in the way of having fun.
Rules are absolute and must be defended at all costs.
I follow them when necessary but find them mostly tedious.
I find comfort in knowing my place and what is expected of me.
I believe rules are essential for maintaining order and morality.
I often don't understand the rules, so I just do my best.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a weekend away from the office?

options.text: Hosting a big party where I am the star of the show.
Engaging in outdoor survival skills or tending to a farm.
Relaxing at home or hanging out at a local bar with friends.
Working on an art project or spending time with family.
Organizing my home and caring for my pets.
Watching sports, gambling, or enjoying a large meal.

topics.display_name: Enneagram Type

synopsis.title: Which Enneagram Type Best Describes Your Personality?
synopsis.summary: Discover the core motivations and fears that drive your behavior through this comprehensive Enneagram assessment. This quiz analyzes your unique perspective on the world to identify which of the nine distinct personality types aligns with your inner self. Gain valuable insights into your strengths, challenges, and path toward personal growth.

characters.name: Type 1 (Reformer)
characters.short_description: You are a principled and purposeful individual driven by a strong sense of right and wrong and a desire for integrity.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a powerful internal compass that guides you toward improvement and excellence in all areas of life. Your commitment to ethics and order makes you a reliable and conscientious person who strives to live up to high standards. You often find yourself noticing what is wrong or out of place, feeling a deep-seated need to correct errors and advocate for justice. This drive for perfection can be a significant strength, leading to high-quality work and a reputation for honesty and reliability in your community.

However, your inner critic can be relentless, leading to feelings of resentment or frustration when others do not meet your expectations. You may struggle with rigidity and a tendency to be overly judgmental of yourself and those around you. Learning to accept imperfection and finding balance between your ideals and reality is key to your growth. When you are at your best, you are wise, discerning, and exceptionally effective at making the world a better place through your dedication to what is right.

characters.name: Type 2 (Helper)
characters.short_description: You are a warm, demonstrative, and generous person who finds deep fulfillment in supporting and connecting with others.
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural gift for sensing the needs of those around you and are often the first to offer a helping hand or a listening ear. Your identity is closely tied to your relationships, and you take great pride in being a dependable source of love and care. You are typically friendly, empathetic, and highly attuned to the emotional climate of a room, making you an excellent mediator and friend. Your generosity is a core strength that fosters strong community bonds and makes people feel truly seen and valued.

The challenge for you lies in acknowledging your own needs and desires, which you often suppress in favor of serving others. You may find yourself seeking validation through your helpfulness, potentially leading to feelings of being unappreciated or even manipulative if your efforts are not reciprocated. It is vital for you to practice self-care and realize that you are worthy of love simply for who you are, not just for what you do for others. When healthy, you are truly altruistic and provide unconditional support to everyone in your life.

characters.name: Type 3 (Achiever)
characters.short_description: You are a success-oriented and pragmatic individual who is highly motivated by goals, efficiency, and personal advancement.
characters.profile_text:
You are energetic, self-assured, and often excel in competitive environments where your hard work and adaptability can shine. You have a keen ability to read the room and present yourself in the most effective way possible to achieve your objectives. Your focus on productivity and results makes you a natural leader and a high performer who inspires others to reach their potential. You value competence and are often recognized for your impressive accomplishments and polished image, which you maintain with great care.

Despite your outward success, you may struggle with a tendency to tie your self-worth entirely to your achievements. This can lead to workaholism and a disconnect from your authentic feelings as you prioritize your public persona over your inner life. You might find it difficult to slow down or admit vulnerability, fearing that failure would diminish your value in the eyes of others. By learning to value your internal self regardless of external accolades, you can find genuine satisfaction. At your best, you are authentic, inspiring, and truly admirable for your character.

characters.name: Type 4 (Individualist)
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive, introspective, and creative person who seeks to express your unique identity and find deep meaning in life.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rich inner world and a profound appreciation for beauty, authenticity, and emotional depth. Unlike others who might shy away from difficult feelings, you are willing to explore the full spectrum of human experience, often using your insights to create art or foster deep connections. You value being true to yourself above all else and often feel a sense of being different or misunderstood by the mainstream. This uniqueness is your greatest strength, allowing you to offer a perspective that is both original and poignant to those around you.

However, your focus on what is missing or what makes you different can lead to cycles of melancholy and self-absorption. You may struggle with envy, comparing your internal struggles to the seemingly easy lives of others. It is important for you to ground yourself in the present and recognize that your worth is not defined by your moods or your perceived flaws. When you find balance, you are profoundly creative and capable of transforming your personal experiences into universal truths that resonate with everyone, making you a powerful force for emotional honesty.

characters.name: Type 5 (Investigator)
characters.short_description: You are an observant, cerebral, and independent thinker who values knowledge, competence, and personal autonomy above all.
characters.profile_text:
You are naturally curious and driven to understand the underlying principles of how the world works. You prefer to step back and observe rather than jump into the fray, often developing a high level of expertise in specific areas of interest. Your independence is a core trait; you value your privacy and are careful about how you spend your time and energy. You are often seen as a calm, objective problem-solver who can remain detached and analytical even in high-pressure situations, providing clarity where others see chaos.

Your tendency to retreat into your mind can sometimes lead to isolation and a disconnect from your physical and emotional needs. You may feel that you lack the resources to deal with the demands of the world, causing you to hoard your time and knowledge as a form of protection. Learning to engage more fully with others and trust in your ability to navigate the external world is essential for your development. When you are at your best, you are a visionary pioneer who offers profound insights and innovative solutions to complex problems that others cannot solve.

characters.name: Type 6 (Loyalist)
characters.short_description: You are a committed, security-oriented, and responsible individual who values stability, community, and reliable support systems.
characters.profile_text:
You are highly attuned to potential risks and work hard to create a safe environment for yourself and those you care about. Your loyalty is one of your most defining characteristics; you are a steadfast friend and a dedicated team member who can be counted on in a crisis. You often seek out guidance from trusted authorities or systems to navigate uncertainty, and you are excellent at identifying pitfalls before they become major issues. Your foresight and preparedness make you an invaluable asset in any group or organization.

The primary challenge you face is a persistent sense of anxiety and self-doubt. You may find yourself trapped in worst-case scenario thinking, which can lead to indecisiveness or defensive behavior. You might struggle with a push-pull dynamic regarding authority, seeking its protection while also fearing its control. Building internal confidence and learning to trust your own intuition will help you find the security you seek without relying solely on external sources. When healthy, you are courageous, self-reliant, and a powerful advocate for the common good and the safety of your community.

baseline_questions.question_text: When approaching a new task or project, what is your primary objective?

options.text: Ensuring that every detail is handled correctly and meets high ethical standards.
Making sure that the people involved feel supported and that their needs are met.
Finding the most efficient way to achieve a successful and impressive result.
Creating something that is unique, authentic, and personally meaningful.
Gathering all necessary information to fully understand the mechanics of the task.
Identifying potential risks and ensuring there is a reliable plan for security.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you feel stressed or under pressure?

options.text: I become more rigid and critical of myself and others for not meeting standards.
I work harder to be helpful to others, often ignoring my own needs in the process.
I focus entirely on productivity and performance to avoid the feeling of failure.
I withdraw into my inner world to process my complex emotions and sense of self.
I retreat into my mind to analyze the situation objectively and preserve my energy.
I become hyper-vigilant and seek reassurance or guidance from trusted sources.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your relationship with your internal emotions?

options.text: I try to keep them under control so they don't interfere with doing what is right.
I am highly attuned to the feelings of others, sometimes more than my own.
I often set my emotions aside to stay focused on my goals and outward image.
I embrace my emotions fully, even the difficult ones, to maintain my authenticity.
I prefer to observe my emotions from a distance to maintain my independence.
I experience a lot of internal anxiety and scan my feelings for signs of trouble.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a social or professional group, what role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The conscientious organizer who ensures everyone follows the rules and procedures.
The warm supporter who nurtures relationships and helps individuals feel valued.
The self-assured leader who motivates the team toward tangible achievements.
The introspective individualist who offers a unique and creative perspective.
The observant expert who provides objective analysis and specialized knowledge.
The loyal team member who ensures the group's stability and preparedness.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these scenarios would be most unsettling for you to experience?

options.text: Being perceived as unethical, irresponsible, or fundamentally 'wrong.'
Feeling that I am unwanted or that my presence is not needed by others.
Failing at a task and being seen as incompetent or unsuccessful.
Feeling that I am just like everyone else and have no unique identity.
Being overwhelmed by demands without having the knowledge to handle them.
Losing the support systems or guidance that I rely on for my security.

topics.display_name: Spice Girl

synopsis.title: Which Spice Girl Is Your Inner 90s Icon?
synopsis.summary: Are you ready to zig-a-zig-ah your way into a self-discovery journey? Whether you are all about that platform shoe life or prefer a sleek tracksuit, your personality holds the key to a legendary pop persona. Grab your Union Jack dress and find out which member of the world's most iconic girl group matches your vibe!

characters.name: Posh Spice
characters.short_description: You are the epitome of high-fashion elegance and refined poise, always maintaining a polished exterior regardless of the chaos around you.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an innate sense of style that leans toward the minimalist and the expensive, preferring a sleek black dress over anything loud or cluttered. Your strength lies in your composure and your ability to command a room with a single, well-timed pout or a subtle, knowing glance. You value quality over quantity in all things, from your wardrobe to your social circle, and you rarely feel the need to over-explain yourself to those who do not understand your vision. You are the anchor of sophistication in your group, providing a sense of aspirational class that others look up to.

However, your reserved nature can sometimes be mistaken for coldness or snobbery by those who have not yet earned your trust. You might find it difficult to let your hair down in casual settings, fearing that a crack in your perfect facade will diminish your authority or carefully curated image. Learning to embrace a bit of messiness can actually make your sophisticated charm even more magnetic to the world. When you do finally offer a genuine smile, it carries immense weight because people know it was truly earned.

characters.name: Sporty Spice
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy powerhouse who values physical agility, authenticity, and the thrill of a challenge above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are most at home in motion, whether you are literally backflipping through life or simply tackling a massive to-do list with athletic precision. Your wardrobe is built for comfort and performance, reflecting a personality that is straightforward, honest, and refreshingly devoid of pretense. You are the ultimate team player, always ready to lend your strength to a friend in need, and your competitive spirit is tempered by a genuine sense of fair play and camaraderie. You bring a grounded, relatable energy to every situation, ensuring that things actually get done while everyone else is busy debating the details.

Your relentless drive can sometimes lead to burnout if you do not take the time to rest and recharge your batteries. You might also struggle with situations that require delicate diplomacy, as your preference for blunt honesty can occasionally bruise more sensitive egos. Remember that not every moment is a race to the finish line, and there is significant value in the slow, quiet stretches of the journey. By allowing yourself to be vulnerable and still, you find a different kind of strength that complements your physical prowess.

characters.name: Baby Spice
characters.short_description: You radiate a youthful, sweet energy that masks a surprisingly sharp intuition and a heart of pure gold.
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural ability to see the best in people, often acting as the emotional glue that keeps your group together during turbulent times. Your aesthetic is soft and playful, favoring pastels and whimsical details that reflect your approachable and kind-hearted nature. People are drawn to your warmth, and you use this influence to foster harmony and joy wherever you go, proving that kindness is a formidable power in its own right. Beneath the pigtails and lollipops lies a person who is deeply observant and knows exactly how to navigate social dynamics to keep the peace.

Because you project such an innocent image, others may occasionally underestimate your intelligence or resolve, treating you with a patronizing tone that you find frustrating. You might also find it hard to say no to people, leading you to take on more emotional labor than you can realistically handle. Standing your ground does not mean losing your sweetness; it just means ensuring your own needs are met too. When you finally speak up with conviction, people are often stunned by your clarity, making your voice one of the most influential in the room.

characters.name: Ginger Spice
characters.short_description: You are a bold, charismatic leader who champions individuality and is not afraid to make a loud, vibrant statement.
characters.profile_text:
You are the firecracker of the group, possessed of a relentless ambition and a flair for the dramatic that ensures you are never ignored. Your confidence is infectious, and you take great pride in advocating for self-expression and girl power in every facet of your life. You are not afraid to take risks or wear the most daring outfits, as you believe that life is far too short to blend into the background or follow someone else's rules. You lead with your heart and your convictions, often serving as the spokesperson for your friends and the face of any movement you join.

Your strong personality can sometimes dominate the conversation, leaving little room for others to share their perspectives or lead the way. You may also struggle with the quieter moments of life, feeling a constant pressure to be on and performing at your highest level of intensity. Finding a balance between your public persona and your private self will help you maintain your legendary spark without burning out. When you learn to share the spotlight, your leadership becomes even more effective because you empower those around you to shine just as brightly.

characters.name: Scary Spice
characters.short_description: You are a fierce, outspoken force of nature who lives life at full volume and encourages everyone else to do the same.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your incredible confidence and your refusal to be anything other than your authentic, boisterous self. Your presence is marked by a wild, untamed energy and a love for bold patterns and loud laughter that fills any space you inhabit. You are the first to speak up against injustice and the first to start the party, acting as a catalyst for change and excitement in your social circles. You value bravery and directness, and you have zero patience for anyone who tries to dim your light or tell you to settle down.

Your intensity can be overwhelming for those who prefer a more subdued pace, and your directness can sometimes be perceived as aggression rather than passion. You might find it challenging to sit still or listen patiently when you already have a clear vision of how things should go. Learning to modulate your volume and energy can help you connect more deeply with a wider variety of people without losing the fierce spirit that makes you unique. Your true power lies in your ability to inspire others to break out of their shells and embrace their own inner roar.

baseline_questions.question_text: Your squad is planning a legendary night out. What is your primary contribution to the group chat?

options.text: Sending the location of the most exclusive, minimalist lounge in the city.
Checking if everyone is hydrated and ready for a 5K run the next morning.
Sending heart emojis and making sure no one's feelings got hurt in the planning.
Taking the lead and declaring exactly what time the 'Girl Power' summit begins.
Sending high-energy voice notes to get everyone hyped for the dance floor.

baseline_questions.question_text: You are invited to a high-stakes costume party. What is your 'Iconic' outfit strategy?

options.text: A sleek, designer little black dress—timeless, expensive, and perfectly tailored.
A vibrant, high-performance tracksuit paired with the freshest platform sneakers.
Something soft, pink, and whimsical with ribbons and a playful touch.
A bold, sequined statement piece that demands every eye in the room stays on you.
Head-to-toe leopard print and a fearless attitude that says 'I have arrived.'

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically navigate a minor disagreement with a close friend?

options.text: A single, well-timed, icy glance that communicates my disapproval without a word.
Blunt, athletic honesty—let's hash it out quickly so we can get back to the game.
I act as the emotional glue, using sweetness and intuition to restore harmony.
I step up as the spokesperson for the solution, leading the way to a resolution.
I speak my mind at full volume, ensuring my perspective is heard loud and clear.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate 'Zig-a-zig-ah' fuel for a long day?

options.text: A chilled glass of sparkling water and a moment of quiet, refined poise.
The adrenaline rush of a backflip or a high-intensity workout session.
A sugary treat and a playlist of pure, nostalgic pop hits.
The thrill of standing on a stage and inspiring a crowd with a bold speech.
Breaking the rules and laughing as loud as possible with my favorite people.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were a mythical creature, which vibe would you radiate to the world?

options.text: A regal, silver-maned unicorn—rare, sophisticated, and slightly untouchable.
A swift and powerful griffin, always ready for the next physical challenge.
A playful woodland fairy spreading joy, kindness, and a bit of magic.
A majestic phoenix, rising boldly from the ashes to lead the flock.
A fierce, fire-breathing dragon that refuses to settle down or be tamed.

topics.display_name: Golden Girl

synopsis.title: Which Golden Girl Is Your Spirit Senior?
synopsis.summary: Grab a slice of cheesecake and pull up a chair on the lanai! Are you the sharp-tongued matriarch with a story for every occasion, or the naive sweetheart with a heart of gold? It is time to find out which of Miami's most iconic roommates matches your fabulous personality.

characters.name: Dorothy
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-witted voice of reason who navigates life with a healthy dose of sarcasm and a brilliant, analytical mind.
characters.profile_text: You are the anchor of your social circle, possessing a dry wit that can cut through nonsense like a hot knife through butter. While others might get lost in flights of fancy or romantic delusions, you remain grounded in reality, often expressing your frustration with a perfectly timed glare or a biting remark. Your intelligence is your greatest asset, allowing you to solve complex problems and lead others, even when they drive you absolutely crazy with their antics. Beneath that tough, sensible exterior lies a deeply loyal friend and a person of immense integrity. You value education, literature, and meaningful conversation over superficial fluff. Your pitfall is a tendency toward cynicism and a struggle to let your guard down, but those who truly know you understand that your high standards come from a place of deep caring. You are the one people turn to when they need the truth, no matter how much it might sting.

characters.name: Rose
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, optimistic soul whose innocent perspective and endless supply of eccentric stories bring a unique warmth to every room.
characters.profile_text: You see the world through a lens of pure wonder and unwavering kindness, often finding the silver lining in situations where others only see clouds. Your heart is as big as the Great Lakes, and you approach every day with a sunny disposition that is both endearing and occasionally baffling to your more cynical peers. You have a penchant for sharing long, winding anecdotes about your heritage or childhood that may not always make sense to others, but they reflect your deep connection to your roots and your love for storytelling. Your greatest strength is your empathy and your ability to forgive, making you the emotional glue that keeps your group together. However, your naivety can sometimes make you a target for those who do not share your pure intentions. You prefer a simple, honest life filled with animals, competitive board games, and sweet treats. While people might underestimate your intelligence because of your whimsical nature, your emotional wisdom and resilience are truly unparalleled.

characters.name: Blanche
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, confident socialite who embraces glamour and romance with an unapologetic zest for life and a Southern charm that is impossible to ignore.
characters.profile_text: You are the undisputed star of your own life, radiating a magnetic confidence that draws people toward you like moths to a flame. With a wardrobe full of sequins and a heart that beats for passion, you refuse to let age or societal expectations dim your shine. You view every social gathering as an opportunity to dazzle and every new acquaintance as a potential grand romance. Your self-esteem is legendary, and you take great pride in your appearance and your ability to command a room with just a flutter of your eyelashes. While you may seem focused on the superficial, you possess a fierce sense of loyalty to your chosen family and a surprisingly vulnerable side when it comes to your past. Your pitfall is a tendency toward vanity and a constant need for external validation, but your infectious energy and joie de vivre make you the life of any party. You teach everyone around you that it is never too late to pursue your desires and that loving yourself is the most important romance of all.

characters.name: Sophia
characters.short_description: You are a feisty, straight-talking matriarch who uses your vast life experience and sharp tongue to keep everyone on their toes.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature who has seen it all and is not afraid to talk about it, usually starting with a vivid story from your youth in the old country. Your filter is non-existent, and you take great pleasure in delivering the unvarnished truth with a side of mischievous humor. You have a knack for manipulating situations to your advantage, but it is almost always done with the intention of teaching a lesson or looking out for the people you love. Your resilience is forged from a lifetime of challenges, giving you a perspective that is both ancient and incredibly sharp. Despite your prickly exterior and your habit of making jokes at others' expense, you are the ultimate protector of your family. You value tradition, good food, and the wisdom that only comes with age. Your pitfall is a stubborn streak and a tendency to be overly meddlesome in the lives of those around you. However, your presence provides a sense of continuity and strength that reminds everyone that getting older does not mean slowing down—it just means getting better at the game.

baseline_questions.question_text: A pipe suddenly bursts in the kitchen! What is your immediate reaction to the chaos?

options.text: I grab a wrench and calculate the repair costs while delivering a sarcastic remark about the quality of modern plumbing.
I try to plug the leak with a decorative sponge and tell the water a soothing story to make it stop flowing.
I put on my most flattering silk robe and hope a ruggedly handsome repairman is on call tonight.
I sit down at the table, grab a snack, and wait for someone else to fix it while I recount a similar flood in the old country.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a disagreement with your closest friends?

options.text: I use cold, hard logic and a sharp tongue to dismantle their argument until they see reason.
I apologize immediately to keep the peace and offer to bake a batch of Sperheoven Krispies.
I assume they are just acting out because they are intimidated by my natural radiance and magnetism.
I deliver a stinging one-liner that ends the conversation and then go about my business as if nothing happened.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your go-to strategy for a first date?

options.text: Engaging in a battle of wits and judging their literary tastes before the appetizers arrive.
Sharing a three-hour anecdote about a competitive herring-juggling festival from my youth.
Checking my reflection in every available surface and ensuring the lighting highlights my best features.
Testing their mettle with a few blunt questions to see if they can handle a real woman with history.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally fall into during a group outing?

options.text: The designated driver and voice of reason who keeps everyone from making a scene.
The wide-eyed enthusiast who is just happy to be included and finds everything 'terrific.'
The center of attention who ensures that all eyes—and cameras—are focused on me.
The mischievous observer who makes commentary on everyone else's behavior from the back of the room.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate comfort food after a long, stressful day?

options.text: A sophisticated glass of wine and a quiet moment to read the newspaper in peace.
A massive slice of cheesecake shared with friends while discussing our feelings.
Anything decadent and expensive, preferably served by someone who finds me irresistible.
A hearty bowl of pasta and a story about how much better the tomatoes tasted in 1922.

topics.display_name: Seinfeld Character

synopsis.title: Which 'Seinfeld' Character Are You? (The Ultimate Show About Nothing Quiz)
synopsis.summary: Are you the master of your domain or just a hipster doofus? Whether you're obsessing over a marble rye or airing your grievances during Festivus, your personality matches one of the iconic New Yorkers from the hit 90s sitcom. Take this quiz to find out if you're the glue holding the group together or the one causing all the 'serenity now' moments.

characters.name: Jerry Seinfeld
characters.short_description: You are the observational comedian and the glue that holds your eccentric circle of friends together.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of routine and meticulous observation, often finding humor in the mundane details of everyday life. Your life is defined by a sense of evenness, where things usually work out for you in the end, a phenomenon your friends find both fascinating and frustrating. You value cleanliness and order, often to the point of being a germaphobe, and you have a low tolerance for social awkwardness or a breach of etiquette. You prefer to keep things light and avoid heavy emotional burdens whenever possible.

In relationships, you tend to be incredibly picky, often breaking up with people over minor quirks or perceived flaws. While you are a loyal friend, you often play the role of the detached observer, providing witty commentary on the chaos surrounding you rather than getting deeply involved. Your strengths lie in your wit, stability, and ability to navigate social minefields with ease. However, your primary pitfall is a certain emotional coldness and a tendency to prioritize your own comfort over the needs of others.

characters.name: George Costanza
characters.short_description: You are the neurotic, short-tempered lord of the idiots who often finds yourself trapped in webs of your own making.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a unique blend of insecurity, thriftiness, and a relentless desire for validation from a world that you feel is out to get you. Your life is a series of elaborate schemes and white lies designed to avoid work, impress others, or simply escape a social obligation. You possess a remarkable ability to overthink every situation, often leading to self-sabotage just when things seem to be going your way. Your world is one of constant frustration with the perceived injustices of the universe.

Despite your many neuroses, you are incredibly resilient in your own way, always ready with a new plan or a fake persona like Art Vandelay. You are a master of the un-date, and your romantic life is often a comedy of errors fueled by your own dishonesty or lack of confidence. Your strength is your persistence and creativity in the face of adversity, but your greatest pitfall is your tendency to be your own worst enemy, turning minor inconveniences into full-blown catastrophes through your own panic and deceit.

characters.name: Elaine Benes
characters.short_description: You are the assertive, quick-witted professional who isn't afraid to speak her mind or push her way through a crowd.
characters.profile_text:
You are a high-energy individual with a sharp tongue and a low threshold for stupidity. Whether you are working in publishing or navigating the complexities of the New York dating scene, you approach life with a mix of ambition and cynical humor. You are known for your physical expressiveness and you aren't afraid to stand up for yourself, even if it means getting into a heated argument over a big salad or a lack of toilet paper. You demand respect and often find yourself fighting against the idiocy of the men in your life.

Your social life is a whirlwind of eccentric boyfriends and complicated friendships, and you often find yourself acting as the voice of reason, even if your own life is just as chaotic. You value your independence and intelligence, but you can be prone to bouts of intense jealousy or frustration when things don't go your way. Your strength is your resilience, directness, and ability to hold your own in any social circle. Your pitfall is a tendency to become overly aggressive, judgmental, or petty when you feel the world is not meeting your standards.

characters.name: Cosmo Kramer
characters.short_description: You are the eccentric, high-energy neighbor whose life is a series of bizarre adventures and spontaneous ideas.
characters.profile_text:
You live life entirely on your own terms, operating on a frequency that few others can tune into. With your wild hair, vintage wardrobe, and dramatic physical entrances, you are a force of nature who treats the world as your personal playground. You are a man of many get-rich-quick schemes and unusual hobbies, from making your own pasta to running a reality bus tour. You possess an innate confidence and a hipster doofus charm that allows you to stumble into success and high-society circles without even trying.

Your social interactions are marked by a brutal honesty and a total lack of traditional boundaries, which can be both refreshing and exhausting for those around you. You are a true original, unburdened by the social anxieties that plague your friends, and you possess a genuine, if eccentric, kindness. Your strength is your absolute authenticity, your physical comedy, and your zest for life. However, your pitfall is a complete lack of focus and a tendency to get swept up in ideas that have no basis in reality, often dragging your friends into your latest chaotic endeavor.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when a stranger commits a minor breach of social etiquette in public?

options.text: I make a mental note of the absurdity to joke about it with my friends later.
I obsess over the injustice and let it ruin my mood for the rest of the afternoon.
I confront the person directly and demand they acknowledge what they did.
I barely notice, or I might accidentally do something even more eccentric in response.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary philosophy when it comes to your career and work life?

options.text: I prefer a steady, predictable routine where I can observe the world from a distance.
I am constantly looking for the path of least resistance or a way to look busy while doing nothing.
I am ambitious and professional, but I am frequently held back by the incompetence of others.
I avoid traditional employment in favor of various 'get-rich-quick' schemes and creative ventures.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of the following best describes your approach to personal hygiene and your living space?

options.text: I am a borderline germaphobe who needs everything in its exact, clean place.
My space is a bit of a mess, often reflecting my current state of panic or thriftiness.
It is generally organized, but I have very specific requirements for the products I use.
My home is an open-door environment where boundaries are non-existent and rules don't apply.

baseline_questions.question_text: When dating someone new, what is the most likely reason you would consider ending the relationship?

options.text: I discovered a very minor physical quirk or personality flaw that I simply cannot overlook.
I feel the need to break up before they realize who I actually am and reject me first.
They failed to meet my high standards of intelligence or social awareness.
The relationship became too conventional or started to interfere with my spontaneous lifestyle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a situation where you feel the 'system' or a specific rule is being unfair to you?

options.text: I provide a witty, cynical commentary on the situation but ultimately go along with it.
I concoct an elaborate lie or a fake persona to circumvent the rules entirely.
I get physically expressive and loud, making sure everyone knows I am being mistreated.
I simply ignore the rule and act as if it doesn't exist, often succeeding by sheer confidence.

topics.display_name: Succession Sibling

synopsis.title: Which Roy Sibling Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Do you have the killer instinct required to run a global media empire, or are you just hoping for a seat at the table? Whether you are the 'number one boy' or the eldest son who was interested in politics from a very young age, your personality says a lot about your place in the family. Answer these questions to find out which Roy sibling truly matches your chaotic energy and corporate ambition.

characters.name: Kendall Roy
characters.short_description: You are the heir apparent grappling with the weight of a legacy you can never quite secure.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by a relentless, often desperate ambition to prove your worth to a father who looms larger than life. You possess a sharp mind for business and a genuine desire to modernize the family empire, yet your path is frequently undermined by your own internal fragility and a tendency to self-destruct when the pressure becomes unbearable. You oscillate between moments of visionary clarity and deep, existential despair, always searching for a validation that remains perpetually out of reach. Your strengths lie in your technical competence and your ability to see the bigger picture, but your pitfalls are your emotional volatility and a recurring habit of overplaying your hand. You often find yourself trapped in a cycle of rebellion and seeking approval, making you a tragic figure who is both the architect of your own success and your own worst enemy.

characters.name: Siobhan Roy
characters.short_description: You are the strategic outsider who uses a veneer of progressive values to mask a ruthless desire for control.
characters.profile_text: You pride yourself on your intelligence and your ability to navigate political landscapes that your brothers often find baffling. While you initially positioned yourself outside the family business to establish your own identity, the allure of power eventually drew you back into the fold, revealing a core that is just as calculating as your father's. You are a master of the pivot, capable of changing your allegiances and your principles the moment a better opportunity presents itself. Your primary strength is your perception; you see the moves on the board long before others do. However, your downfall is often your own arrogance and a fundamental inability to trust anyone, including those closest to you. You struggle with the vulnerability required for genuine connection, preferring to maintain a cool, detached exterior that protects you from the emotional fallout of your decisions.

characters.name: Roman Roy
characters.short_description: You are the provocative jester whose sharp wit and erratic behavior hide a deep-seated need for belonging and paternal love.
characters.profile_text: You navigate the world through a lens of irony and crude humor, using your quick tongue to deflect from the genuine insecurities that plague you. While others might dismiss you as a mere clown, you possess a keen instinct for the darker, more visceral aspects of human nature and business, often identifying the vibe of a situation before anyone else. You are fiercely loyal to the idea of family, even when that family is toxic, and you crave the approval of your father more than any of your siblings, often debasing yourself to get it. Your strengths are your adaptability and your lack of pretension, which allow you to move through spaces that more rigid people cannot. Yet, your impulsivity and your inability to take anything seriously—including yourself—often lead to disastrous consequences. You are a bundle of contradictions, seeking intimacy while simultaneously pushing everyone away with your abrasive persona.

characters.name: Connor Roy
characters.short_description: You are the eldest sibling who has opted out of the corporate fray to pursue eccentric personal interests and delusional political ambitions.
characters.profile_text: You have spent most of your life on the periphery of the family power struggle, preferring the isolation of your ranch and the pursuit of niche hobbies over the cutthroat world of Waystar Royco. Because you were never truly considered a contender for the throne, you have developed a unique, albeit somewhat detached, perspective on your family's dynamics. You are often the one who reminds your siblings of their shared history, even if they rarely listen to you. Your strengths lie in your relative independence and your ability to find contentment outside the boardroom, but your pitfalls are a profound lack of self-awareness and a tendency to spend exorbitant amounts of money on vanity projects. You often feel overlooked and undervalued, leading you to make grand, often ridiculous gestures to assert your relevance. While you may seem harmless compared to your siblings, your entitlement and your disconnect from reality make you a wildcard in your own right.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when your authority is directly challenged in a professional setting?

options.text: I take it personally and immediately try to prove my competence through a grand, visionary counter-move.
I maintain a cool exterior while privately calculating how to undermine the challenger's position.
I use sharp humor or a provocative comment to deflect the tension and test their reaction.
I dismiss the challenge as beneath me and retreat to my own private projects or interests.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary philosophy regarding family loyalty?

options.text: It is a heavy burden that I must carry to protect the family legacy, even if it destroys me.
It is a strategic alliance that lasts only as long as our interests are mutually aligned.
It is the only thing that truly matters, and I will endure any amount of abuse to stay in the fold.
It is a source of frustration because my siblings never take my independent contributions seriously.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal role within a large organization?

options.text: The visionary CEO who modernizes the company and secures the future.
The power-behind-the-throne who manipulates the political landscape from the inside.
The high-energy fixer who relies on gut instinct and isn't afraid to get their hands dirty.
The respected elder statesman who pursues grand, symbolic goals outside the daily grind.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle your own emotional vulnerability?

options.text: I cycle between intense ambition and deep, private moments of existential despair.
I mask it with a veneer of professional detachment and intellectual superiority.
I hide it behind a constant stream of irony, jokes, and abrasive behavior.
I convince myself that I am above the petty emotional squabbles of others.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear regarding your personal reputation?

options.text: Being seen as a failure who couldn't live up to a massive family name.
Being viewed as predictable or easily manipulated by those in power.
Being cast out or forgotten by the people whose approval I crave most.
Being completely ignored or treated as an irrelevant footnote in history.

topics.display_name: Pixar Protagonist

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Pixar Protagonist Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you are more of a determined space ranger or a sensitive chef with a big dream? Pixar characters are known for their deep emotions, unique quirks, and incredible journeys of self-discovery. Take this quiz to find out which legendary hero from the Pixar universe truly reflects your personality!

characters.name: Buzz Lightyear
characters.short_description: A courageous space ranger who values duty, honor, and the importance of teamwork above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of action and unwavering conviction, often viewing the world through a lens of heroism and high-stakes missions. Your sense of duty is your strongest asset, allowing you to face daunting challenges with a brave face and a "can-do" attitude that inspires those around you. While you might occasionally struggle with your own identity or the realization that you aren't exactly who you thought you were, your resilience helps you adapt and find a new, even more meaningful purpose. You thrive in structured environments where rules and protocols provide a clear path to victory. However, your rigid adherence to the "manual" can sometimes make you appear stubborn or out of touch with the nuances of a situation. Your greatest strength lies in your loyalty to your friends, for whom you would literally travel to infinity and beyond. Learning to embrace your vulnerabilities and accept help from others is your path to true leadership.

characters.name: Remy
characters.short_description: A passionate and talented chef who refuses to let social expectations or physical limitations hinder his culinary dreams.
characters.profile_text: You possess an extraordinary refined palate and a creative spirit that constantly seeks to elevate the mundane into something sublime. Your passion for your craft is all-consuming, often leading you to take significant risks just to achieve the perfect "flavor profile" in life. You are a perfectionist at heart, driven by the belief that anyone can cook, or more broadly, that anyone can achieve greatness regardless of their background. This drive makes you highly resourceful, though it can also lead to a sense of isolation when others don't share your vision or standards. You often find yourself caught between two worlds: the expectations of your family and the pull of your own unique ambitions. While you are capable of working behind the scenes to make others look good, you eventually crave the recognition that your talents deserve. Your challenge is balancing your individualistic drive with the needs of your community, ensuring that your pursuit of excellence doesn't alienate the people who care for you most.

characters.name: Woody
characters.short_description: A loyal and dedicated leader who prioritizes the well-being of his community and the bonds of friendship.
characters.profile_text: You are the glue that holds your social circle together, often taking on the weight of responsibility to ensure everyone feels safe and valued. Your loyalty is legendary, and you possess a deep-seated need to be useful and needed by those you love. You are a natural strategist, always thinking several steps ahead to protect your "territory" and maintain the status quo that you find so comforting. This protective nature, however, can sometimes manifest as jealousy or a fear of change when new people or circumstances threaten your established position. You find it difficult to let go of the past, often clinging to traditions and roles that may no longer serve you as they once did. Despite these internal struggles, your heart is always in the right place. You are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice for the greater good, demonstrating a level of selflessness that few can match. Your journey is one of learning that your worth isn't just tied to your job or your utility, but to the person you are when the spotlight is off.

characters.name: WALL-E
characters.short_description: A curious and resilient soul who finds beauty in the forgotten and remains hopeful even in the loneliest of circumstances.
characters.profile_text: You are a quiet observer with a heart full of wonder, possessing the rare ability to find joy in the smallest, most discarded details of life. Your persistence is your defining trait; you are capable of performing the same tasks for years without losing your sense of purpose or your capacity for love. You are a collector of experiences and memories, cherishing the connections you make with others above all else. While you may seem unassuming or even outdated to some, your simplicity is actually your greatest strength, allowing you to see the truth when others are blinded by complexity or consumerism. You are driven by a deep, innate desire for companionship, and you are willing to cross the galaxy to protect the ones you care about. Your innocence can sometimes make you vulnerable to a harsh world, but your unwavering optimism acts as a beacon for everyone you encounter. You remind those around you that life is about more than just survival; it is about finding something—or someone—worth living for.

characters.name: Merida
characters.short_description: A fiercely independent and skilled archer who fights for the right to determine her own destiny.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and defiance, possessing a spirit that cannot be contained by tradition or societal expectations. Your skills are a point of immense pride, and you prefer the freedom of the open air to the stifling confines of a formal setting. You are headstrong and impulsive, often acting on your emotions before fully considering the consequences, which can lead to unintended friction with those in authority. Your relationship with family is complex; you love them deeply, but you refuse to let their desires dictate the course of your life. This internal conflict often drives you to seek out unconventional solutions, even if they carry a high risk. You are a trailblazer who values authenticity above all else, and you aren't afraid to admit when you've made a mistake, provided you can fix it on your own terms. Your journey involves learning that true bravery isn't just about physical prowess or rebellion, but about the courage to listen, to empathize, and to mend the bonds that your pride may have broken.

characters.name: Miguel
characters.short_description: A vibrant and determined musician who seeks to honor his heritage while forging his own unique path in the world.
characters.profile_text: You are a dreamer fueled by the rhythms of your culture and the melodies of your own heart. Your passion for self-expression is so strong that it often puts you at odds with the traditions of your family, creating a tension between who you are and where you come from. You possess a natural charisma and a tenacity that allows you to navigate even the most daunting obstacles, including those that seem literally out of this world. You are deeply curious about your roots, believing that understanding the past is the key to unlocking your future. However, your single-minded pursuit of your goals can sometimes cause you to overlook the feelings of those who are trying to protect you. You are a bridge-builder, eventually finding ways to reconcile your personal ambitions with the legacy of your ancestors. Your strength lies in your ability to bring people together through the power of story and song, proving that family and individual identity are not mutually exclusive but are instead two parts of the same beautiful harmony.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when starting a new project or journey?

options.text: Upholding my duty and following a clear code of honor.
Mastering a complex skill and proving that greatness can come from anywhere.
Ensuring the safety and stability of my community or 'tribe'.
Finding beauty in the small things and staying hopeful despite the odds.
Challenging the status quo to live life entirely on my own terms.
Connecting with my roots while expressing my own unique creative voice.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a major obstacle or setback?

options.text: I rely on established protocols and a 'can-do' heroic attitude.
I become highly resourceful and find a way to work around my limitations.
I strategize and am willing to make personal sacrifices for the greater good.
I endure with quiet persistence and wait for the right moment to act.
I face it head-on with bold, sometimes impulsive action.
I use my determination and charisma to bridge divides and find a new path.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you feel most at home in?

options.text: A structured organization with clear ranks and a shared mission.
A high-pressure creative space where I can pursue perfection.
A familiar, cozy setting where everyone knows their role.
A quiet place filled with interesting treasures and memories.
The wide-open outdoors, free from formal constraints and expectations.
A vibrant gathering full of music, storytelling, and family history.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your greatest personal strength?

options.text: Unwavering bravery and a deep sense of purpose.
A refined perspective and a drive for absolute excellence.
Selfless dedication and loyalty to those I lead.
An optimistic spirit that sees the best in every situation.
Fierce independence and the courage to admit when I am wrong.
The ability to honor tradition while still being a trailblazer.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your closest friends describe your role in the group?

options.text: The reliable protector who values teamwork and protocol.
The visionary who pushes everyone to achieve higher standards.
The glue that holds everyone together through thick and thin.
The devoted companion who would go to the ends of the earth for love.
The free spirit who values authenticity above social expectations.
The communicator who uses their talents to unite different worlds.
